In compliance with the Commercial Act, shareholders' meeting notices containing detailed information(date and venue, agenda items, electronic voting procedures, etc.) are disclosed through electronic disclosure systems two weeks prior to meetings, with additional notifications via website electronic announcements. Major shareholders holding 1% or more equity stakes receive postal notifications regarding shareholders' meeting convening. Protection of Shareholder Rights JYP Entertainment has implemented electronic voting since the 25th Annual General Meeting of Shareholders held in March 2020 to enhance shareholder convenience and encourage active voting participation. As part of shareholder return policies, we implement cash dividend distributions. Annual dividend matters are determined through Board resolutions, with approved dividends finalized at shareholders' meetings. Previously, the Articles of Incorporation designated December 31 annually as the dividend record date; however, at the 30th Annual General Meeting of Shareholders held in March 2025, the Articles were amended to allow dividend record date determination following Board dividend proposal resolutions. These dividend process improvements enhance dividend predictability for shareholders.
Shareholder Return Policy JYP Entertainment institutionalized its dividend policy in 2018 and has maintained annual dividend payout ratios of 16-18% based on consolidated net income since 2019. For 2024, a dividend of KRW 534 per share was declared. Through 2025, we target maintaining dividend payout ratios of 15-20% based on consolidated net income. Based on the 15% payout ratio benchmark, 2024 dividends achieved approximately 120% of target implementation. From 2026 onward, we plan to announce revised dividend policies considering capital expenditures for new headquarters expansion. Additionally, we maintain fair disclosure compliance and provide transparent stakeholder communication through website publication of financial information and stock price data.

The CEO effectively supports organic and standardized audit processes that seek enhanced business management methodologies through advancing the integrity management framework of the independent audit function. In addition, the Audit Committee, maintaining independence from the Board of Directors, monitors internal accounting control system operations and oversees financial reporting processes. Based on this internationally standardized internal audit governance, JYP Entertainment continuously elevates our integrity management practice standards. Audit Office JYP Entertainment operates an Audit Office reporting directly to the CEO to ensure independence as required by the International Professional Practices Framework(IPPF), the international internal audit practice standard. Audit Office maintains fair and unbiased approaches with professional expertise to avoid conflicts of interest and provide objective audit results to the CEO and Audit Committee. Internal auditors within Audit Office comprise professionals holding global certifications including CIA, CISA, and CDPSE. Additionally, annual continuing professional education(CPE) programs are conducted to enhance internal audit knowledge and expertise, striving for global-standard internal audit quality.
Business Assessment Team JYP Entertainment operates a Business Assessment Team under Audit Office to strengthen proactive auditing across group company management operations. Business Assessment Team conducts proactive preventive audits across high-risk areas for fraud and inefficiency within group companies. Through this approach, we supervise integrity management implementation at subsidiaries as well as overseas affiliate, proactively addressing global-standard internal audit governance requirements. Legal Affairs Team JYP Entertainment operates a Legal Affairs Team to support corporate legal decision making and minimize legal risks across all business activities. The team provides practical and specific legal services throughout business implementation processes, identifying and addressing civil, criminal, intellectual property, and fair trade issues arising from business operations, thereby supporting JYP Entertainment's legal stability and credibility.
Compliance Team JYP Entertainment established and operates a Compliance Team in 2025 for effective prevention of potential legal risks. Compliance Team systematically monitors compliance with applicable laws and regulations across the Company's diverse business domains. Additionally, the team provides regular training programs to help employees understand and apply complex and evolving regulatory requirements to their work, minimizes potential legal issue occurrence through proactive internal monitoring activities, and plays a critical role in fostering organizational culture where compliance mindset is naturally embedded company-wide. Through systematic Compliance Team operations, JYP Entertainment will reduce regulatory violation uncertainties and further strengthen foundations for stable and sustainable growth.
Integrity and Compliance Management Organizational Chart of the Integrity Management System Legal Affairs Team Compliance Team Business Support Division Board of Directors Audit Office Business Assessment Team CEO Audit Committee 9 3 J Y P P r o f i l e W a y t o S u s t a i n a b l e E n t e r t a i n m e n t E S G P e r f o r m a n c e A p p e n d i x Strategy Integrity Management for Employees and Partners JYP Entertainment distributes the CEO's Notice on Integrity Management twice annually to prevent corruption among employees and partners. As an entertainment industry leader, JYP Entertainment strives to fulfill responsibilities and obligations alongside employees and partners by adhering to legal, moral, and social standards. Furthermore, we verify that key partners have established and implemented the Code of Conduct for Partners. Code of Conduct for Integrity Management(Regulation) JYP Entertainment's Audit Office has established and publicly disclosed the Code of Conduct for Integrity Management to enhance organizational transparency. The Code of Conduct for Integrity Management presents behavioral standards that all JYP employees must comply with providing clear decision-making and behavioral judgment criteria for employees. Additionally, it embodies our commitment to fulfilling responsibilities and obligations as a global company aiming to become a company that earns genuine respect and trust from society members. This includes employees' fundamental responsibilities and obligations, stakeholder relationships, prohibition of receiving/providing money and entertainment, protection of public interest whistleblowers, and others. Integrity Management Training JYP Entertainment provides integrity management and internal audit/fraud awareness training for all employees, including new hires. Annual online ethics training aims to enhance understanding of integrity management necessity and implementation methods while fostering organization-wide ethical mindset in work performance. In 2024, 432 employees(429 regular employees and 3 contract employees) completed ethics training.
Compliance Training JYP Entertainment provides legal and compliance training conducted by Legal Affairs Team leaders and compliance officers. In 2024, a total of 110 employees completed fair trade education. JYP Entertainment will continue to expand related training and activities to internalize compliance awareness among employees and mitigate compliance risks.
Integrity and Compliance Management  JYP Entertainment strives to remain a respected and trusted company that fulfills its responsibilities and duties as a leader of the entertainment industry by ensuring compliance with laws, ethical standards, and social norms.  To this end, we do our utmost to establish a transparent and intergroup organizational culture by fulfilling our social responsibilities based on integrity management and strengthening anti-corruption efforts. In pursuit of this commitment, we have established and run Audit Office under my direct supervision.   We do not tolerate unjust/corrupt practices such as unfair transactions, bribery or lavish entertainment, or any unethical behaviors that tarnish our reputation. If you witness any employee engaging in behaviors contrary to the principles of integrity, including making unjust demands, please report the matter promptly to our audit office at au@jype.com.  Moving forward, we will continue to promote a culture of honesty and rationality not only among individual employees but also throughout our organization, fostering healthy growth alongside our shareholders.  During this Lunar New Year, I extend my heartfelt wishes for a prosperous and joyous holiday with your loved ones. May your families and businesses thrive in the coming year.

The corruption/ fraud risk oversight framework comprises systematic stages including risk identification, analysis, assessment, and treatment for high-risk areas. In particular, we operate this framework with particular focus on proactive corruption prevention to support sustainable business operations. Anti-Bribery Management System Certification(ISO 37001) In 2023, JYP Entertainment's Audit Office became the first company in Korea's entertainment industry to obtain Anti-Bribery Management System Certification(ISO 37001), an international anti-corruption standard certification from the British Standards Institution, the world's most prestigious standards organization. We conducted comprehensive company-wide corruption risk diagnosis and assessment, securing an internationally standardized framework to prevent and monitor corruption-related violations including bribery, embezzlement, and recruitment misconduct. In 2024, we successfully completed our first-year certification review to maintain continuous verification of our global-standard anti-corruption management system. JYP Entertainment will continue advancing our integrity management framework to lead the global entertainment industry. Compliance Enhancement JYP Entertainment has positioned compliance enhancement as a core driver of sustainable growth and plans to advance our regulatory compliance framework. The newly established Compliance Team will develop customized compliance systems reflecting the entertainment industry's unique operational environment and organizational characteristics. This includes establishing medium to long-term compliance plans, enacting and systematizing compliance regulations, and operating systematic education programs to cultivate compliance awareness among all employees. Through these efforts, JYP Entertainment will dramatically enhance operational transparency and firmly establish a corporate culture where sustainable decision-making extends beyond simple fulfillment of legal obligations.
Contract Process Improvement JYP Entertainment continuously updates internal standard contracts and adds new formats in alignment with newly enacted and revised regulations. We plan to establish contract management regulations for employees' reference to enhance understanding of contract related processes. JYP Entertainment will continue conducting consistent monitoring and updates of relevant laws to ensure fair contract management.
Integrity and Compliance Management Corruption Risk Oversight System Risk Assessment Criteria Establishment ·  Establish risk assessment procedures and criteria Risk Analysis ·  Analyze likelihood of occurrence and potential impact severity for risks Corruption Risk Identification ·  Determine internal and external issues and stakeholder needs by team ·  Identify corruption risks related to team operations Residual Risk Assessment ·  Assess residual risks and risk levels Risk Control ·  Determine organizational control measures for each corruption risk ·  Evaluate effectiveness of control measures Risk Mitigation ·  Develop and implement action plans for medium-level and above residual risks ·  Certification: ISO 37001:2016 (Anti-Bribery Management System) ·  Date of Certification: November 2023 ·  Certification Body: British Standards Institution(BSI) ·  Certification Scope: JYP Entertainment (entire headquarters) 9 5 J Y P P r o f i l e W a y t o S u s t a i n a b l e E n t e r t a i n m e n t E S G P e r f o r m a n c e A p p e n d i x Risk Management Establishing the Internal Audit System JYP Entertainment has established a global-standard internal audit framework to implement integrity management across all group companies, including subsidiaries and overseas affiliates. Audit Office independently conducts regular audits, thematic (specific) audits, and fraud audits to perform internal audits that address comprehensive business risks and meet elevated external stakeholder expectations. In addition, we are implementing an internal audit solution (DRF, Dynamic Risk Finder) for overseas affiliates, subsidiaries, and headquarters that focuses on auditing embezzlement through group-wide financial transaction monitoring. In particular, we are establishing a global-standard internal audit framework capable of proactively and effectively responding to risk scenarios including potential fund misuse and embezzlement through data analytics-based financial risk diagnosis and monitoring systems. Management Diagnostic Survey In 2024, JYP Entertainment's Audit Office conducted surveys and training for 101 affiliate entity employees to strengthen the ethical environment and assess regulatory compliance status, completing subsequent follow up measures based on results. The management diagnostic survey comprises leadership integrity, sexual harassment, acceptance of monetary gifts and entertainment, conflicts of interest, and organizational inefficiency and irrationality. Through this initiative, employees enhanced understanding of relevant regulations, while the Company proactively diagnosed the organization's sustainable integrity management environment and implemented corresponding follow-up measures. In 2025, Audit Office is designing a scientific and quantified management diagnostic survey framework for invisible corruption risks to advance our company-wide integrity management environment. Through this approach, we plan to expand advanced organizational management diagnostics based on psychological stability and respect for JYP Entertainment employees across all group companies. JYP Entertainment Whistleblowing System JYP Entertainment operates the 'JYP Whistleblowing System' based on integrity management with thorough anonymity protection. The JYP Whistleblowing System is operated independently by Audit Office to ensure transparent and fair investigations and prevent secondary victimization of whistleblowers. Additionally, anonymity is strictly guaranteed throughout the entire reporting process through technical encryption, and the system supports eight languages including Korean, English, Japanese, and Chinese, enabling all employees of headquarters, subsidiaries, and overseas affiliates to report 24/7/365. In 2024, eight violations were reported through the JYP Whistleblowing System, with disciplinary actions completed for six cases. 9 6 J Y P P r o f i l e W a y t o S u s t a i n a b l e E n t e r t a i n m e n t E S G P e r f o r m a n c e A p p e n d i x Organizational Chart for Information Security Management Governance Top Management JYP Entertainment appointed a CISO/CPO as an unregistered executive in 2025, who was recruited in 2024 as an information security specialist for more systematic(personal) information protection management. The CISO/CPO operates specialized information security organizations, reviews information protection policy and objective establishment, and manages company-wide implementation. In addition, the CISO/CPO reviews and improves countermeasures for security issues and internal/external threats that may arise during information asset handling and business operations.
Information Security Team JYP Entertainment established Information Security Team in 2024 for effective internal information security operations. Information Security Team serves as the organization that practically implements and operates our information security policies, responsible for comprehensive security management and monitoring. Key responsibilities include security system establishment and maintenance, security incident prevention and response, and related training. Additionally, the team analyzes latest security threats and develops response strategies to protect JYP Entertainment’s information assets.
Information Security Committee JYP Entertainment established Information Security Committee in 2025 to discuss response measures for major information security issues. Information Security Committee is chaired by the CEO with executive and management participation, convening at least once annually. The Information Security Committee deliberates matters including information protection policy amendments, related business plans, and investments.
Company-wide Information Security Council JYP Entertainment supports the Company-wide Information Security Council to upgrade the enterprise-level information security management system. In particular, subsidiary BLUE GARAGE has appointed a CISO/CPO and conducts regular meetings with JYP Entertainment. The Council is responsible for establishing enterprise-wide information protection policies, reviewing major security issues and response strategies, and serves the role of discussing security risk management and employee security awareness enhancement measures. In addition, we operate Information Protection Working Groups centered on operational departments. Information Security Teams from respective organizations at JYP Entertainment and BLUE GARAGE collaborate to discuss company-wide security system operations, practical security problem resolution, and latest security technology implementation methods, continuously improving information security standards.
Information Security JYP Entertainment Information Security Statement CEO CEO JYP Entertainment Subsidiaries Information Security Committee CISO · CPO CISO · CPO (Personal) Information Security Council Information Security Team Information Security Team (Personal) Information Security Working Group 9 7 J Y P P r o f i l e W a y t o S u s t a i n a b l e E n t e r t a i n m e n t E S G P e r f o r m a n c e A p p e n d i x Strategy Information Security Policy In 2025, JYP Entertainment established optimized information security policies and guidelines reflecting information security-related laws and regulations. The Information Security Policy applies to all JYP Entertainment employees. The information protection policy encompasses information protection organization, personnel security, information systems and security incidents, networks, information devices, physical security, servers, and related components. Furthermore, we have developed an information security medium to long-term roadmap and operate an information protection management framework to enhance technical and policy security advancement.
Information Security Training JYP Entertainment conducts company-wide information security training to internalize information protection culture. Information security training materials are distributed to all employees through groupware, with regular security training for all employees conducted under CISO leadership. Additionally, information security training is implemented for all employees working at JYP Entertainment regardless of employment type. In 2024, 423 employees completed information security training. Beyond this, we emphasize information security importance by sharing cases including phishing emails and hacking attempts. Moving forward, we will continue developing information security content and adding field-specific specialized training programs to ensure professional and detailed education delivery. Establishment of Risk Detection and Response systems for Information Assets JYP Entertainment conducts regular risk detection and improvement activities to strengthen information asset security. We operate continuous security monitoring through external security specialists, implementing response measures for detected risk factors according to internal procedures. Additionally, we have comprehensively assessed information asset risk factors through information security consulting and established countermeasures for phased implementation.

Personal information collected for customer consultation and service provision is destroyed without delay after its purpose has been achieved. However, service proposals, inquiries, and reports are retained for 12 months, while website visit related records such as access logs are retained for 3 months before destruction. Additionally, we do not provide user personal information to external parties in principle. However, this excludes cases where users have provided prior consent or provision is required by law.
Personal Data Protection Measures JYP Entertainment implements technical and administrative measures to ensure personal information security. Technical measures include access control system operations and security program installation, while administrative measures include employee security training. In addition, we have secured technical stability for software including database and OS access control systems. Detailed information is available in the JYP Entertainment Privacy Policy. Currently, we do not operate systems for personal information encryption and de-identification, but plan to strengthen related technical measures if sensitive personal information collection increases in the future.
Information Security Data Subject Rights Data subjects may request access to their personal data held by the company at any time.
Data subjects may request the correction or deletion of their personal data held by the company.
Data subjects may request the suspension of the processing of their personal data held by the company.
Access to Personal Data Correction and Deletion of Personal Data Suspension of Personal Data Processing Automatic Personal Information Collection and Refusal JYP Entertainment notifies automatic personal information collection through our Privacy Policy. We respect data subjects' choice regarding automatic personal information collection(cookie installation) and provide guidance on methods to refuse automatic personal information collection through our Privacy Policy.
Data Subject Rights JYP Entertainment responds promptly and faithfully to data subject requests for personal information access, correction, deletion, and processing suspension. When data subjects request personal information correction, we do not use or provide such information until correction completion, and when deletion is requested, we delete it without delay and do not retain such information in any form.
JYP Entertainment Privacy Policy 9 9 J Y P P r o f i l e W a y t o S u s t a i n a b l e E n t e r t a i n m e n t E S G P e r f o r m a n c e A p p e n d i x Risk Management Internal Evaluation of Information Security JYP Entertainment conducts internal audits to identify information security vulnerabilities such as account management and log monitoring, assessing risk occurrence probability and impact. Improvements identified through this process are being implemented with specific measures, and we plan to expand internal audit scope to advance our framework.
Information Security Management for Partners JYP Entertainment distributes and provides relevant guidelines and forms to enable partners to comply with and implement JYP Entertainment’s information security regulations. Furthermore, JYP Entertainment provides partner information security checklists to monitor compliance requirements during collaboration processes with our company. In the future, we plan to establish frameworks for monitoring and evaluating partner information security levels for regular management.
Third-Party Certification of Information Security BLUE GARAGE, a JYP Entertainment subsidiary, plans to obtain ISMS certification in the second half of 2025 to provide more stable and reliable services to users. To this end, we have established robust information security frameworks and continuously strive to advance our information security systems through partnerships with specialist companies.
Information Security Third-Party Assessment and Diagnosis of Information Security JYP Entertainment has conducted third-party consulting through external specialist organizations for objective information security level diagnosis and continuous improvement. Through this approach, we have identified security risk factors and are establishing and implementing systematic countermeasures based on identified improvement initiatives. Moving forward, we plan to conduct third-party assessments including penetration testing to strengthen technical security, further enhancing JYP Entertainment’s information security reliability and stability.

t a i n m e n t E S G P e r f o r m a n c e A p p e n d i x GHG Verification Statement Introduction DNV Business Assurance Korea Ltd. (“DNV”) was commissioned by JYP Entertainment Corporation(“Company”) to perform thirdparty verification for the Company’s Greenhouse Gas Statement. The Company is responsible for the preparation of the GHG Statement on the basis set out within the ‘ISO 14064-1:2018’, ‘WRI/WBCSD GHG Protocol: A Corporate Accounting and Reporting Standard’, ‘The Corporate Value Chain(Scope 3) Accounting and Reporting Standard’, ‘IPCC Guideline: 2006 1’. The Company has full responsibility of the GHG Statement. According to terms of contract, DNV expressly disclaims any liability or co-responsibility for any decisions a person or an entity may make based on the verification opinion.
Objective and Scope of Verification The objective of the verification is to present an independent verification opinion on the company's GHG Statement, and the scope of verification is as follows; ·  Organizational boundary 2: JYP Entertainment Corporation, JYP Publishing Co.,Ltd., BLUE GARAGE Corporation, JYP Partners Corporation, INNIT Entertainment Corporation, JYP Entertainment Japan Inc., JYP Entertainment Hong Kong LIMITED (incl. JYP Beijing Cultural Exchange Ltd.), JYP USA Inc.
· Operational boundary: Direct Emissions (Scope 1), Indirect Emissions (Scope 2) and Other Indirect Emissions (Scope 3) · Reporting period: 2024.01.01 ~2024.12.31 Verification Approach The verification has been conducted in accordance with the verification principles and tasks outlined in the ‘ISO 14064-3:2019’, based on a reasonable level of assurance for Scope 1 and Scope 2 emissions of domestic companies, and a Limited Level of assurance for overseas companies and the Scope 3 emissions of JYP Entertainment Corporation. DNV planned and performed our work so as to obtain all the information and explanations deemed necessary to provide us with sufficient evidence to provide a verification opinion with 5% materiality level. As part of the verification process, we have reviewed as follows ; ·  Adequacy of GHG data control, collection and emission calculation and report process ·  The GHG inventory is based on measurements and has inherent limitations that may arise from the process of calculating, estimating, and finalizing the reported data.
Conclusions Based on the verification, there is no evidence that the GHG Statement is not materially correct and is not a fair representation of GHG data and information ; · DNV presents an ‘Unmodified’ opinion on Greenhouse Gas Emissions 2024 GHG Emissions (ton CO2eq ) Energy Consumption(TJ) 2) Scope 1 Scope 2 Scope 3 Total 1) JYP Entertainment and its subsidiaries Market-based 3) 347.340 118.157 397.529 863 27.336 Location-based 4) 1,145.556 1,890 1) Total emissions = Scope 1 + Scope 2 + Scope 3 2) Energy Consumption: fuel and electricity use (excluding Scope 3 emission) 3)  The ‘Market-based’ emissions are GHG emissions reflected as Scope 2 by purchasing of a renewable energy certificate for taking part in K-RE100. (JYPE’s electricity consumption in FY24: 2,047.975MWh, JYPE’s REC purchase in FY24: 2,050.013MWh, BLUE GARAGE’s electricity consumption in FY24: 101.115MWh, BLUE GARAGE’s REC purchase in FY24: 101.707MWh) 4) The ‘Location-based’ emissions are GHG emissions reported as Scope 2 based of local-grid.

1 2 4 J Y P P r o f i l e W a y t o S u s t a i n a b l e E n t e r t a i n m e n t E S G P e r f o r m a n c e A p p e n d i x Third-party Assurance Statement Overview BSI (British Standards Institution) Group Korea (hereinafter referred to as the "Assurer") was requested to verify the 2024 JYP Entertainment Sustainability Report (hereinafter referred to as the "Report"). The Assurer is independent of the JYP Entertainment Corporation and has no major operational financial interest other than the assurance. This assurance opinion statement is intended to provide information related to the assurance of the JYP Entertainment Corporation report relating to the environment, social and governance (ESG) to the relevant stakeholders and may not be used for any purpose other than the purpose of publication. This assurance opinion statement was prepared based on the information presented by the JYP Entertainment Corporation and the assurance was carried out under the assumption that presented the information and data were complete and accurate.
JYP Entertainment Corporation is responsible for managing the relevant information contained within the scope of assurance, operating the relevant internal control procedures, and for all information and claims contained in the report. Any queries that may arise by virtue of this independent assurance opinion statement or matters relating to it should be addressed to JYP Entertainment Corporation only.
The Assurer is responsible for providing JYP Entertainment Corporation management with an independent assurance opinion containing professional opinions derived by applying the assurance methodology to the scope specified, and to provide the information to all stakeholders of JYP Entertainment Corporation. The Assurer shall not bear any other responsibility, including legal responsibility, to any third party other than JYP Entertainment Corporation in providing the assurance opinion and shall not be liable to any other purpose, purpose or stakeholders related thereto for which the assurance opinion may be used.
Scope The scope of engagement agreed upon with JYP Entertainment Corporation includes the following: -  Reporting contents during the period from January 1st to December 31st 2024 included in the report, some data included the first half of 2025.
-  Major assertion included in the Report, such as sustainability management policies and strategies, goals, projects, and performance, and the Report contents related to material issues determined as a result of materiality assessment.
- Appropriateness and consistency of processes and systems for data collection, analysis and review.
-  In Accordance with the four principles of AA1000 AccountAbility in the report, based on the type of Sustainability Assurance based on AA1000AS v3 and if applicable, the reliability of the sustainability performance information contained in the report.
The following contents were not included in the scope of assurance.
- Financial information in Appendix.
- Index items related to other international standards and initiatives other than the GRI. - Other related additional information such as the website, business annual report.
Assurance Level and Type The assurance levels and types are as follows; -  Moderate level based on AA1000 AS and Type 2 (confirmation to the four principles as described in the AA1000 Accountability Principle 2018 and quality and reliability of specific performance information published in the report.) Description and sources of disclosures covered Based on the scope and methodology of assurance applied, the assurer reviewed the following Disclosures based on the sampling of information and data provided by JYP Entertainment Corporation. [Universal Standards] 2-1 to 2-5 (The organization and its reporting practices), 2-6 to 2-8 (Activities and workers), 2-9 to 2-21 (Governance), 2-22 to 2-28 (Strategy, policies and practices), 2-29 to 2-30 (Stakeholder engagement), 3-1 to 3-3 (Material Topics Disclosures) [Topic Standards] 201-1~3, 203-1~2, 302-1, 302-3~4, 303-5, 305-1~5, 306-1~3, 205-1~3, 206-1, 401-1, 401-3, 403-1~10, 404-1~3, 405-1~2, 406-1, 418-1 Methodology As a part of its independent assurance, the Assurer has used the methodology developed for relevant evidence collection in order to comply with the verification criteria and to reduce errors in reporting. The Assurer has performed the following activities; -  A top-level review of issues raised by external parties that could be relevant to organizations policies to provide a check on the appropriateness of statements made in the report.
- Discussion with managers and staffs on organization’s approach to stakeholder engagement.
- Review of the supporting evidence related to the material issues through interviews with senior managers in the responsible departments.
- Review of the system for sustainability management strategy process and implementation - Review of materiality issue analysis process and prioritization by reviewing materiality issue analysis process and verifying the results -  Verification of data generation, collection and reporting for each performance index and document review of relevant systems, policies, and procedures where available -  An assessment of the company's reporting and management processes concerning this reporting against the principles of Inclusivity, Materiality, Responsiveness and Impact as described in the AA1000 AccountAbility Principles Standard (2018).
- Visit of the JYP Entertainment Corporation HQ to confirm the data collection processes, record management practices.
Limitations and approach used to mitigate limitations The Assurer performed limited verification for a limited period based on the data provided by the reporting organization. It implies that no significant errors were found during the verification process, and that there are limitations related to the inevitable risks that may exist. The Assurer does not provide assurance for possible future impacts that cannot be predicted or verified during the verification process and any additional aspects related thereto.
Competency and Independence BSI (British Standards Institution) is a leading global standards and assessment body founded in 1901. BSI is an independent professional institution that specializes in quality, health, safety, social and environmental management with almost 120 years history in providing independent assurance services globally. No member of the assurance team has a business relationship with JYP Entertainment Corporation. The Assurer has conducted this verification independently, and there has been no conflict of interest. All assurers who participated in the assurance have qualifications as an AA1000AS assurer, have a lot of assurance experience, and have in-depth understanding of the BSI Group's assurance standard methodology.
1 2 5 J Y P P r o f i l e W a y t o S u s t a i n a b l e E n t e r t a i n m e n t E S G P e r f o r m a n c e A p p e n d i x Third-party Assurance Statement Opinion Statement The assurer was carried out by a team of sustainability report assurors in accordance with the AA1000 Assurance Standard v3. Assurer planned and performed this part of our work to obtain the necessary information and explanations assurer considered to provide sufficient evidence that JYP Entertainment Corporation’s description of their approach to AA1000 Assurance Standard and their self-declaration of compliance with the GRI standards were fairly stated.
On the basis of our methodology and the activities described above, it is our opinion that the information and data included in the Report are accurate and reliable and the Assurer cannot point out any substantial aspects of material with mistake or misstatement. We believe that the economic, social and environmental performance indicators are accurate and are supported by robust internal control processes. Conclusions The Report is prepared in accordance with the GRI Standards. (Reporting in accordance with the GRI standards). The detailed reviews against the AA1000 AccountAbility Principles of Inclusivity, Materiality, Responsiveness and Impact and the GRI Standards are set out below.
Inclusivity: Stakeholder Engagement and Opinion JYP Entertainment Corporation defined members, partners, users, shareholders/investors, local communitiy and government/media as a Key Stakeholder Groups. In order to collect opinions by each stakeholder group in the context of sustainability, operated the stakeholder engagement process. JYP Entertainment Corporation conducted a review of the stakeholder engagement process at the Steering Committee in order to reflect the major issues derived through the stakeholder engagement process in sustainability strategy and goals. JYP Entertainment Corporation disclosed the results related to the process in the Report.
Materiality: Identification and reporting of material sustainability topics JYP Entertainment Corporation implemented its own materiality assessment process in consideration of the major business and operational characteristics to derive important reporting issues related to sustainability. In the materiality assessment, JYP Entertainment Corporation conducted the analysis of global sustainability disclosure and evaluation standards, analysis to derive the impact and financial materiality. JYP Entertainment Corporation derived 5 material issues through the process, and disclosed GRI topic standards disclosures related to material issues in the Report.
Responsiveness: Responding to material sustainability topics and related impacts JYP Entertainment Corporation operated a management process for material issues in the context of sustainability derived from the materiality assessment. JYP Entertainment Corporation established mid- to long-term sustainability plans and goals in according to the management methodology established to effectively reflect the expectations of key stakeholders. JYP Entertainment Corporation disclosed the process including policy, indicator, activity and response performance on key issues in the Report.
Impact: Impact of an organization's activities and material sustainability topics on the organization and stakeholders JYP Entertainment Corporation identified the scope and extent of the impacts to the organization and key stakeholders in the context of the sustainability of the material issues reported. JYP Entertainment Corporation established sustainability strategies and objectives based on the analysis results of major impacts, including risks and opportunities for material issues at the governance level, disclosed mid- to long-term plans and strategic system in the Report.
Findings and conclusions concerning the reliability and quality of specified performance information Among the GRI Topic Standards, the following disclourse related Economic, Social and Enviromental were carried out in a assurance Type 2 based on the information and data provided by the reporting organization. In order to verify the reliability and accuracy of the data and information, internal control procedures related to data processing, processing, and management were verified through interviews with the responsible department, and accuracy was verified through sampling. Errors and intentional distortions in sustainability performance information included in the report were not found through assurance processes. The reporting organization manages the sustainability performance information through reliable internal control procedures and can track the process of deriving the source of the performance. Errors and unclear expressions found during the assurance process were corrected during the assurance process and prior to the publication of the report, and the assurer confirmed the final published report with the errors and expressions corrected.
-  GRI Topic standards201-2, 203-1~2, 302-1, 302-3~4, 303-5, 305-1~5, 306-3, 205-1~3, 206-1, 401-1, 401-3, 403-1~10, 404-1~3, 405-1~2, 406-1, 418-1 Recommendations and Opportunity for improvement The assurer will provide the following comments to the extent that they do not affect the result of assurance; Considering the industry and business characteristics of JYP Entertainment Corporation, -  Considering JYP Entertainment's entertainment industry and business characteristics, It may be effective to upgrading key sustainability man-agement systems, such as stakeholder engagement and value chain identification.
-  It may be helpful to advance the sustainability management system by advancing the sustainability performance indicator management sys-tem, including companies subject to consolidation.
GRI-reporting JYP Entertainment Corporation provided us with their self declaration of compliance within GRI Standards. Based on our review, we confirm that social responsibility and sustainable development indicators with reference to the GRI Index. The Assurer confirmed that the Report was prepared in accordance with the GRI Standards and the disclosures related to the Universal Standards and Topic Standards Indicators based on the data provided by JYP Entertainment Corporation. The sector standard was not applied.
Jungwoo Lee, Lead Assurer, LCSAP Seonghwan Lim, Managing Director Issue Date: 20/06/2024 For and on behalf of BSI (British Standards Institution): BSI representative

title: [PDF] Leader of change - Cloudfront.net
content: Employee suggestion program “CHANGE” JYP Entertainment embraces a horizontal organizational culture. Employees address each other without honorific expressions for job titles, and flexible workplace strategies allow employees to work wherever and whenever they are most productive. In 2022, we rolled out the employee suggestion program called “CHANGE”, to give ev-eryone a simple way to voice their opinions regardless of their job ti-tle or function. Various ideas and suggestions from the employees are reviewed and incorporated into the company’s policies and sys-tems, thereby creating a better organizational culture at JYP Entertainment. 1st in entertainment industry to join RE100 1) To mitigate climate change, JYP Entertainment has become the first Korean entertainment company to sign up [...] JYP Entertainment is for those who dream. And we cherish our culture where everyone can dream and fulfill their dreams, and where people with diverse backgrounds can freely share their thoughts and develop their talents. We empower employees through fair evaluation and compensation, and provide trainees with sys-tematic support so they can reach their dreams as artists. And our care program ensures they maintain physical and mental well-being along the way. We take the lead in promoting environmental value. [...] As such, JYP Entertainment is creating a K-pop culture where the entertainment industry and the environment can continue to co-ex-ist through creating content that promotes environmental value. Operating eco-friendly cafe JYP-Soulcup JYP-Soulcup is our in-house café and an eco-friendly complex cul-tural space, driven by its motto “Love You More, Love Earth”. Through the cafe, we aim to practice sustainability-led behavior in every aspect of the business, from purchasing raw materials to op-eration.

JYP Entertainment ESG Report 2021 Leader of change JYP Core Competency ESG Framework JYP ESG Facts Appendix 18 32 38 70 About this Report Overview Through this report, JYP Entertainment will disclose how we manage the environmental, social, and governance aspects of sustainability to various stakeholders in a transparent manner, and demonstrate continued progress of our ESG initiatives. Reporting period and scope For quantitative performance, we disclose three-year data (from 2019 to 2021) for trend analysis, and material managerial topics may include years before 2021 or the first half of 2022.
Reporting principles This report has been compiled using global sustainability report-ing standards, including the Core Option of the Global Reporting Initiative (GRI) Standards and the Sustainability Accounting Stan-dards Board (SASB) framework for the “Internet & Media Ser-vices” and “Media & Entertainment” industries. The financial data in this report has been prepared according to the Korean Interna-tional Financial Reporting Standards (K-IFRS). Independent Assurance This report of JYP Entertainment has been assured by Korea Management Registrar (KMR), an independent assurance service provider, to ensure the integrity of the reporting process as well as the accuracy and credibility of its contents. For further information about this report, please contact JYP Entertainment ESG Committee at esg@jype.com Contents JYP, Leader in Entertainment Founder/Chairman Message CEO Message 2021-2022 ESG Highlights 10 4 Founder/Chairman Message JYP Entertainment ESG Report 2021 5 Founder of JYP Entertainment J.Y. Park Founder/Chairman Message 6 CEO Message 7 JYP Entertainment ESG Report 2021 K-pop fans around the world, Various stakeholders who have been with JYP on our journey, I am pleased to share with you our inaugural Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) Report – Leader of Change.
CEO Message In 2021, JYP Entertainment recorded the highest annual album sales in its history despite the COVID-19 pandemic, with the combined total sales exceeding six million copies. We also suc-cessfully dropped the debut single for Xdinary Heroes, a band group with strong performances, in December 2021 and NMIXX, a girl group flaunting various charms, in February 2022. Backed by these achievements, sales in 2021 grew 34 percent year-on-year to a record high of KRW 193.8 billion, and operating profit rose by 31 percent to KRW 57.9 billion during the same period. JYP Entertainment established JYP Three Sixty, a subsidiary to immerse into the IP/platform businesses, and in 2022, the com-pany set up a North American arm called JYP USA in a bid to expand to the North American and global markets by establish-ing its presence in the US, which dominates the global pop mu-sic scene. We have made improvement in terms of the independence of the Board of Directors (BOD) and gender equality policies through enabling the audit committee to serve as a check and balance on management and appointing new female directors.
Additionally, JYP Entertainment established the Compensation Committee and ESG Committee within the BOD so as to ensure that the executive compensation programs are appropriate and commensurate with performance results and that ESG frame-work is implemented and ESG management is incorporated into our business operations. JYP Entertainment has built its business on the philosophy of “Integrity, Sincerity, Humility, and Love” for the past 25 years since its founding, and is proud to publish this inaugural ESG report, the first deliverable of the company’s ESG management. Through this report, we intend to transparently disclose the company’s management to our stakeholders, take the initiative in preserving the environment, promote partnerships for shared growth, and fulfill our role as a responsible corporate citizen.
Guided by our vision of “Leader in Entertainment,” we will con-tinue our journey of bringing joy to the people of the world and making it a better place with our music. We ask for your contin-ued support and encouragement. Thank you. JYP Entertainment CEO Jimmy Jeong 8 2021-2022 ESG Highlights 9 JYP Entertainment ESG Report 2021 ESG Highlights 2022 2021 Audit, ESG, and Compensation Committees under BOD JYP Entertainment aims to be a respected and trusted company that values integrity, sincerity, humility and love. As a leader in the Korean entertainment industry, we are passionate about discovering and supporting best talent and expanding the global reach of K-Pop.
Support for partners for shared growth We have laid out the JYP Partner Fair Cooperation Guideline to advo-cate the value of fair trade and shared growth. The guideline is the code of conduct that all partners of JYP Entertainment must follow, and guides us to practice transparent and ethical management with our partners. In addition, we operate communication channels for partners to freely present their ideas and make suggestions, and have built a partner support system to foster shared growth in a sus-tainable manner. Expanding EDM social contribution projects overseas JYP Entertainment earmarks three percent of its operating profit from the previous year for social contribution projects. The EDM medical treatment project is our flagship CSR program, in which we provide medical treatment costs for children from lower income families. In 2020 and 2021, we donated KRW 450 million in total and supported 41 children. Taking a step further, in 2021, we signed a memorandum of understanding (MOU) with international NGO World Vision and donated KRW 300 million, expanding the reach of the EDM program overseas. JYP JAPAN also participated in the project and supported 313 overseas children in Mongolia, the Philippines, Bangladesh, and Vietnam.
Training system for personality and talent development JYP Entertainment discovers global talent through casting calls and auditions, and trains them to become all-round artists with good personality and character. The systematic curriculum includes not only courses to improve musical capabilities such as vocal, rap, dance, and composition, but also humanities forum and gender equality education. We also provide support in various areas, such as health checkups, strength training and exercise, organic diet, and psychological counseling. Increasing ratio of female directors to 25%, independent directors to 50% We have bolstered the diversity of the board of directors (BOD) by ap-pointing a female independent director in 2022 and thereby raising the ratio of female directors in the BOD to 25 percent. The indepen-dence of the BOD has also been improved with independent directors now accounting for 50 percent of the BOD. Bernard’s ECOFriends series We produced Bernard’s ECOFriends as part of our environmental program and released it on JYP Entertainment’s official YouTube channel. The series has eco-friendly contents where Bernard Park, a JYP artist, introduces green farming methods or does beach clean-up to raise environmental awareness. A total of 14 films were pro-duced in seven months from May to December 2021. Employee Assistance Program JYP Entertainment operates Employee Assistance Program to pro-mote mental well-being and stress management and offers profes-sional psychological counseling sessions for all members of the company – employees, artists, and trainees. We have extended the program to provide online sessions since the end of 2021, as well as face-to-face ones. Online counseling does not have space and time limitations and is particularly convenient for remote employees who work outside the office environment. Many other employees also uti-lize the online counseling program as it is less burdensome than in-person counseling. Creating ESG Vision and publishing inaugural ESG report We have created the ESG vision “Leader of Change” for a sustainable future. The ESG Vision encompasses JYP Entertainment's determi-nation to build a place where people who enjoy our music can un-leash their dreams and realize their full potential together. It also represents our commitment to spread positive impacts to all our stakeholders, communities and even across the planet, which is the source and sustenance of our lives. In August 2022, it is based on this determination and commitment that we publish our first ever ESG report that highlights our ESG management approach and per-formances.
Employee suggestion program “CHANGE” JYP Entertainment embraces a horizontal organizational culture. Employees address each other without honorific expressions for job titles, and flexible workplace strategies allow employees to work wherever and whenever they are most productive. In 2022, we rolled out the employee suggestion program called “CHANGE”, to give ev-eryone a simple way to voice their opinions regardless of their job ti-tle or function. Various ideas and suggestions from the employees are reviewed and incorporated into the company’s policies and sys-tems, thereby creating a better organizational culture at JYP Entertainment. 1st in entertainment industry to join RE100 1) To mitigate climate change, JYP Entertainment has become the first Korean entertainment company to sign up for RE100. This means all albums recorded at the HQ in 2021 were made using 100 percent re-newable energy. In 2021, we powered 100% of our electricity demand (1,393MWh) with solar PV energy, which reduced 640tCO2eq of green house gas emissions and brought us a step closer to Net Zero. 1) Korean RE100 Certification from Korea Energy Agency 10 Founder/Chairman Message JYP Entertainment ESG Report 2021 11 JYP Entertainment aims to be a respected and trusted company that values integrity, sincerity, humility and love. As a leader in the Korean entertainment industry, we are passionate about discovering and supporting top talent and expanding the global reach of K-Pop. Company Snapshot JYP Business Leader’s code 12 14 16 JYP, LEADER IN ENTERTAINMENT 01 12 JYP, Leader in Entertainment 13 JYP Entertainment ESG Report 2021 JYP Entertainment Korea Seoul Los Angeles Hong Kong Tokyo JYP Entertainment USA JYP Entertainment China JYP Entertainment Japan JYP, Leader in Entertainment Company Snapshot •JYP Entertainment Corp.
•Founded: April 25, 1996 •Address: 205, Gangdong-daero, Gangdong-gu, Seoul •CEO: Jimmy Jeong Key Financials Sales revenue Operating Profit 2019 2020 2021 194 155 144 2019 2020 2021 58 43 44 Milestones 1996 Company incorporated Re-named to JYP Entertainment Head office moved to newly built JYP Center in Cheongdam Established JYP Entertainment China Established JYP Entertainment Japan Inc.
Established JYP Entertainment Hong Kong Limited Acquired shares of JYP Publishing Co., Ltd., Established JYP Publishing USA Moved to a new building in Gangdong Established JYP Three Sixty Established JYP USA 2001 2002 2008 2010 2017 2018 2020 2021 2022 Founded in 1996, JYP Entertainment has grown into a leader in the Ko-rean entertainment business. Starting with the Chinese subsidiary in 2008, we established subsidiaries in Japan and the US in 2010 and 2022, respectively, spearheading the global expansion of K-Pop beyond Korea. The 2021 sales revenue of JYP Entertainment reached a record high of KRW 193.8 billion, despite the COVID-19 pandemic. (unit: KRW in billion) 14 JYP, Leader in Entertainment 15 JYP Entertainment ESG Report 2021 JYP ENTERTAINMENT’S SALES REVENUE BY BUSINESS as in 2021 consolidated financial statements At JYP Entertainment, we leverage our unrivaled talent discovery & training system and music & performance production as our core competencies and operate in three primary businesses: Album/digital content, performances & concerts, and licensing using intellectual property (IP) of JYP artists. Even amid the COVID-19 pandemic, 28% 14% 58% JYP Business we have ventured to launch a new channel for online live performances, while continuing to expand our busi-ness through forging cooperative partnerships, as artists perform overseas more frequently with K-Pop’s re-cent global rise. Alb um /d igi tal co nte nt KR W 1 1 2 .8 bi llio n KR W 54 .9 bi llio n KR W 26 .3 bi llio n ma na ge me nt Pe rfo rm an ce s a nd Despite the downward trend in the global recorded music industry, JYP Entertainment has witnessed a steady increase in album sales for its artists since 2015 along with the growing fanbase centered on the domestic and Japanese market. We have our own in-house music production infrastructure and an impressive roaster of producers and songwriters with successful track records under JYP Publishing, including executive producer JY Park. In addition, in line with the global rise of the K-Pop industry, the overseas activities of our artists have increased, and the demand for our music, which was limited to specific countries such as Korea and Japan, is now spreading to other overseas regions. Responding to such changes, JYP Entertainment has entered into partnerships with major international record labels and distributors, such as Sony Music, TME (Tencent Music Entertainment), Republic Records, and Orchard to expand, the global distribution channels for our music content.
We have formed a dedicated management organization for each artist early on from the debut for more coordinated management and marketing activities, and engaged in the direct service business based on the recognition and stardom of the artists, and the licensing business leveraging their intellectual property (IP). This business has been growing since 2016 when the company expanded the artist line-up following organizational and process improvements. In the case of licensing businesses using IP, the value and demand is expanding due to the scalability of the business and the overall growth of the content industry. Utilizing this, we release various digital content and music content, including those uploaded on YouTube, and also sell artist merch products as part of our core business. In July 2021, we established JYP Three Sixty with the aims to focus on MD sales and IP businesses and enhance platform-based global distribution, thereby strengthening connection and bond with global fandoms. In 2022, led by JYP Three Sixty, JYP Shop was launched as the first online MD mall, to meet global demand by introducing various merch products including albums and content in various languages. More recently, we have been expanding the IP licensing business through forging various collaborative partnerships, including Naver Z, a Naver subsidiary that runs metaverse platform Zepeto.
JYP Entertainment provides management and promotion services for our artists at home and abroad, including TV shows, TV series/ films, commercials, online content, and radio shows. We schedule by prioritizing programs that can help promote newly-released albums most effectively and considering artists’ characteristics and capabilities. In addition, through an expert organization with more than 20 years of broadcast casting experience, we focus on preventing a wide range of risks that may occur in the casting process in advance and selecting the most efficient content for improving artist's image. In line with the recent trend, we leverage online channels, including YouTube, as a medium to meet and communicate with fans, along with the traditional channels such as music broadcasts, awards ceremonies, radio shows, and various entertainment programs. JYP Entertainment, which has a global fandom, conducts concert tours in domestic and overseas regions, and generates stable guarantee revenue through ticket sales or performance copyrights sales and secondary value through DVD production and online live viewing copyright sales. In 2021, however, the performance and concert sales plummeted to 1/20 of the 2019 scale due to the restrictions on offline performances amidst the COVID-19 pandemic. Undaunted by the challenge, we jointly launched the online concert platform “Beyond LIVE” in an attempt to create a new form of online live performance that has never been tried before. Virtual performances hosted on the “Beyond LIVE” platform have been received well among fans. For example, the virtual concerts held in 2020 for TWICE and Stray Kids utilized the augmented reality (AR) technology to add virtual elements such as light sticks and audience seats, and inserted sound of crowds cheering. We not only brought satisfaction to the concert-goers in the absence of live music performances to enjoy in person, but also delivered unique virtual experience enabled by implementing various AR stage effects and backdrops to the audiences around the world without physical hurdles. In addition, when we resumed in-person performances with a phased easing of COVID-19 restrictions, we held online concerts in parallel and created added value over multiple layers. Commercials & broadcast appearances management Merchandise (MD) and IP licensing Album and digital content business Performances & concerts management an d I P li ce nsi ng Me rc han dis e s ale s 16 JYP, Leader in Entertainment 17 JYP Entertainment ESG Report 2021 JYP Entertainment has spearheaded the effort to expand the scope and reach of K-Pop by discovering and promoting some of the iconic art-ists in the global music scene. Going forward, we will continue to reinvent ourselves and live up to our vision, “Leader in Entertainment.” To this end, JYP conforms to the internal management philosophy of “Leader’s Code,” which serves as the basic standards of behavior for all JYP members to follow and represents our commitment to everyone who loves JYP’s music. Based on the Leader’s Code, we endeavor to become a respected company that upholds integrity, sincerity, humility and love and that ushers in a better world through thinking brilliantly and taking actions efficiently. JYP fully complies with laws, ethical standards, and social codes of conduct. We are committed to fulfilling our responsibilities and obligations as a member of the entertainment industry and taking the lead in spreading positive impacts in our society. Leader's Code a R e s p e c t e d C o m p a n y Vision CORE VALUE SYSTEM 1. You have nothing to fear, if you have nothing to hide. 2.  The more successful you become, the more powerful your voice. But your voice will fall on deaf ears when you lose your integrity in the process. Integrity 1.  We pursue growth with quality, not mere speed.
2.  We promote a culture where hard work is valued. Sincerity 1.  We always see the good in others and look for ways to improve ourselves. 2.  We are better when we put others ahead of ourselves for the good of the team.
Humility 1.  Your dream gains a new momentum when it is not just for yourself, but for the sake of something greater.
2.  We actively seek and adopt ideas for a healthier body and mind. Love 1.  We keep working on the ideas that can open up new possibilities for others. 2.  It is new ideas or new perspectives on the existing that change the world. Think Brilliant 1.  We implement ways to work smarter, not harder.
2.  We increase productivity at work and make more time for a life outside of work.
Act Efficient Leader in Entertainment L e a d i n g C o m p a n y 18 Founder/Chairman Message JYP Entertainment ESG Report 2021 19 JYP’s core competencies include the unique and differentiated system for discovering and training new artists as well as unparalleled music and performance production. We create performances tapping into our wide pool of experts, flexible production structures, and the best production infrastructure. JYP CORE COMPETENCY 02 Artist Incubation Music & Performance Production JYP Artists 20 24 26 20 JYP Core Competency 21 JYP Entertainment ESG Report 2021 Artist Incubation Casting / Audition JYP Entertainment is actively looking for rising talent through various casting activities and auditions. Based on the annual business plan, we carry out official annual audition, special auditions, and monthly auditions to find talented people from around the world. Furthermore, we welcome year-round applications through our online audition website and SNS channels for online casting calls. Differentiated trainee selection criteria As part of our trainee selection process, we conduct several steps to see if applicants have the qualities we look for. We meet with each applicant for a separate aptitude Q&A session, and seek to better understand the emotional state of trainees through a personality test program that reflects experts’ opinions. This multi-faceted assessment process forms the very foundation of JYP’s unrivaled artist incubation system, and also plays a key role in signing potential artists with the qualities and personality the company pursues early on from the audition stage. In-house platform for auditions In 2010, JYP Entertainment rolled out its own online audition webpage (audition.jype.com), and has since been operating the platform so anyone can submit their application anytime, anywhere, regardless of age, gender, or nationality. Even in the face of the COVID-19 pandemic, we continued on with auditions in line with the non-face-to-face trend. We plan and conduct auditions more creatively and freely on the online platform, meeting hundreds of applicants with various talents every day. Official annual audition program with tradition and history JYP Entertainment has grown into a total entertainment company that boasts long history and tradition in the Korean pop music and moves the global K-Pop culture. At the center of the tradition lies JYP’s official annual audition program, which began in 2007 and has since discovered so many artists including Wooyoung (2PM), Baek Yerin, Jay B and Jinyoung (GOT7), Nayeon and Jeongyeon (TWICE), Seungmin (Stray Kids), and Jungsu (Xdinary Heroes). Our official At JYP Entertainment, we have long been implementing and constantly improving differentiated criteria for selecting artists and trainees. Our systematic approach to training helps artists develop competence, and nurture good personality and positive attitude.

Skill Training (dance, singing, etc) Ethics / character education annual audition is Korea’s one and only audition program that creates a virtuous cycle, in which the audition produces many artists, and that in turn attracts more aspiring talent who wants to become next breakout stars. Training JYP Entertainment’s training system that turns raw talent selected through casting calls and auditions into artists is our growth engine and core competitive edge. The well-thought-out curriculum helps trainees improve their vocal and performance skills and also learn about horizontal communication and competition in good faith, serving as a “steppingstone” to grow into all-round artists. Promoting physical & mental health Health checkups are provided to all trainees every two years. We also support growth and nutrition programs for trainees with de-layed growth. Furthermore, healthy and nutritious meals (JYP BOB) with organic ingredients are offered for free at the in-house restau-rant to all trainees who are still growing. We aim to create a positive training environment through the periodic individual counseling sessions, surveys using Google Forms, anonymous communication channel (JYP_TALK), and counseling with professional psychological counselors. We do our utmost to enhance well-being and quality of life of artists in various ways, providing accommodations, coordinating schedules, and supporting counseling sessions and vacations.
Support for artists’ growth Each artist sets the direction of his desired long-term growth and constantly discusses this with the label members. The label then considers the direction the artist wants to explore and individuality of the artist, and provides various training programs accordingly so that the artist can play up strengths and improve areas of weak-nesses, broadening his musical spectrum as artist. In particular, as artists’ influence in our society and global fandoms are growing, more focus is being placed on character qualities of individual art-ists as public figures. Recognizing this, JYP Entertainment offers *For training, subject matter experts are assigned for each subfield. training programs covering various fields such as foreign languages, society, and culture, along with vocal and performance trainings. Our proactive and horizontal competency development process is instrumental in fostering well-rounded artists. Cultivating personality and ethical values based on Leader’s Code We hold in-depth interviews with every artist two to three times a year. This serves as an opportunity to remind artists of the ethical values in Leader’s Code and to motivate them to go one step further. Artists meet with Executive Producer J.Y. Park for the first in-dept interview right after their debut and discuss their ambitions and plans. Subsequent periodic interviews are heart-to-heart talks over what they have felt and learned and what challenges they have had serving as an opportunity for artists to mull over and reflect upon their personal development. and commands being transmitted unilaterally through a vertical hi-erarchy. To this end, We have in place the “Trainer-Trainee Pro-gram” that matches every trainee to a trainer for closer engage-ment so that there are no trainees left out.
Good faith competition driving artists’ growth At JYP Entertainment, all trainees are evaluated through compe-tence/attitude assessments every month, JYP PARTY (club perfor-mance) three times a year, and JYP SHOWCASE (stage performance) twice a year. This is part of JYP’s continued effort to provide a fair environment for trainees to compete in good faith and grow into competent artists with good personality.
Support in the run-up to debut Once decision is made to debut a group, the company forms a proj-ect group by finalizing the line-up and then focuses on forging teamwork among the members as well as honing skills of each member. Through collaboration with the Artist Division, the project group goes through the customized training phase where each member fine-tunes vocal, dance, choreography, and self-written rap skills, depending on their position in the group, and receives feed-back for further practice. Additionally, we conduct in-depth individu-al interviews at least three times with the finalized trainees to en-courage and guide them to carry responsibility for their words and actions since debut is to reveal oneself in front of a large number of people.
Supporting artists after debut JYP Entertainment provides a wide range of supports for artists so that they unleash their full potential and pursue their dreams. After making a debut, artists can utilize JYP’s systematic support to grow in various fields, and continue to foster the values of Leader’s Code through periodic in-depth interviews. Well-thought-out management services Signed artists are assigned to one of the labels and have full access to systematic support and management services. Evaluation of trainees’ stage presence and potential 3 Assessment 24 JYP Core Competency 25 JYP Entertainment ESG Report 2021 ‘Start with your heart, Finish with your brain’ "Start with your heart, Finish with your brain" is a phrase that encapsulates how we go about creating something. It is when inspiration touches the heart that artists start work-ing on a project. But they strive to create something that will be loved and remembered for a long period of time by thoroughly analyzing them and improving the degree of per-fection to the details. JYP Entertainment brings to life un-paralleled performance by leveraging its team of talented songwriters and choreographers, flexible creative structure, and top-tier production infrastructure. JYP Publishing is a music publisher under the JYP Entertainment banner, which was founded by producer J.Y. Park in 2008. Since 2012, JYP Publishing has hosted a public audition for new songwriters every year, providing opportunities to debut as an official songwriter through fair competition regardless of experience. Winners who make it through the final round are provided with personalized training and support to grow their career as a songwriter. Songwriters housed at JYP Publishing develop their skills and professional attitude through mento-ring and collaborating with other songwriters as well as conducting research on current trends in music. Songwriters under JYP Publishing can work with a sense of belonging as they can utilize the data owned by the company or exchange quality information amongst themselves. JYP Publishing ensures its members also gain additional benefit as copyright owners by releasing creative works and signing licensing agreements. For JYP Entertainment, having such a thriving creative community that deeply understands JYP's direction and suggests musical trends is so critical for content production, which is the bedrock of the entertainment industry. Music & Performance Production Music Production With the aim to become the “Leader in Entertainment,” JYP Enter-tainment works relentlessly to make the music we pursue, and at the center of our effort lies the Music Production System, which is based on JYP 2.0. JYP Entertainment’s unique Music Production System consists of a flexible creative structure, global producing, and creative infrastructure that allows to create music as best as we can. Flexible creative structure Currently, JYP Entertainment operates five independent artist la-bels, each of which has autonomy over its respective artists, plan-ning and producing all music and content independently. This flexi-ble structure is proven to be instrumental in delivering diverse content more promptly and engaging better with fandom. In addi-tion, each label makes original and creative content through close cooperation with JYP Publishing.
JYP Publishing positions itself as a creative leader in the music content industry in Korea by sharing accumulated producing data and know-how with its songwriters to create something new. JYP Publishing's experienced producers team up with their counterpart in each label and make groundbreaking music and content. The company also takes the lead in protecting intellectual property rights for their creations.
Global producing JYP Entertainment has applied “Globalization by Localization” strat-egy to bring in overseas talent and produce original music that ap-peals to local audiences. Through this system, BOY STORY success-fully debuted in China and NiZiU in Japan. We continuously expand our musical spectrum through overseas projects to train and launch local K-POP artists who have cultural familiarity and popular appeal. Best music production facilities We provide an optimal environment for music production to improve the quality of the content itself, as well as the diversity of content and the effi-ciency of production. Equipped with 9 vocal rooms, 16 production rooms, and 11 recording studios, our in-house facilities provide all the workspaces necessary for the creative process, so that artists and producers can im-merse themselves into their projects to develop their skills or interact with others and to create the best results.
Performance Production JYP Entertainment has resident choreographers who have accumu-lated over 10 years of choreography creation know-how and stage experience, and a separate performance creation team called Per-formance Directing LAB. To create an optimal performance, chore-ographers closely participate in the entire album production process from the training of the artists.
Creative work by in-house choreographers At JYP Entertainment, resident choreographers are deployed to the Performance Directing Lab to create unique JYP choreography styles and help artists practice the style of dance they choreograph. Resident choreographers merge many years of choreographic experience and stage experience with JYP’s directions to develop unique performanc-es. Choreographers also identify artists’ preferences and needs from practicing together before their debut and come up with dance pieces that highlight their strengths. During the creative choreographic pro-cess, we closely communicate with the artists and Artist Division to make sure the choreography fits in with everything else, such as the general concept of the album, costume, and artists’ style.
Storytelling through performance One of the focuses we emphasize for our projects is that the chore-ography should be able to convey the story and message of the song, and that the album and performance should tell the story consistently. Choreographers hold several meetings with the Artist Division and decide on a keyword that matches well with the artist and album. We then make sure the keyword runs through the mu-sic, choreography, music video, and costumes, and the storyline of the lyrics is also echoed with choreography. We aim to create effec-tive choreography by aligning key movement elements to the lyrics, as was the case with the J.Y. Park’s “swimming dance,” TWICE’s “TT dance,” and ITZY’s “shoulder dance”. Creating organic choreography Resident choreographers not only create dance works, but then di-rect the performances of JYP artists. As we do not rely on external directors for one-off event, all performances JYP puts together are interconnected to form a greater worldview. Our goal is to shape the stories artists want to convey into an organic choreography on stage.
