JYP Artists 32 CEO Message 33 JYP Entertainment ESG Report 2021 JYP Entertainment's ESG Vision “Leader of Change” embodies our commitment to bringing new changes to the entertainment industry and ushering in a world where everyone can dream together and realize their dreams. ESG FRAMEWORK 03 ESG Vision : “Leader of Change” ESG Management System 34 36 34 ESG Framework 35 JYP Entertainment ESG Report 2021 Change for the Dreamers JYP Entertainment’s ESG vision sets the direction we are heading so that we can motivate our members and practice ESG management. It also represents our commitment as a leader of change in the entertainment industry to creating a place where we make music together and empower those who enjoy our music to realize their dreams. Our vision is not just a slogan, but a promise to spread a positive impact through active participation and action to all stakeholders and communities that enjoy our music and participate in creating it, and even across the planet on which we live. JYP Entertainment will systematically fulfill its promise based on a fair and transparent governance structure and leadership commitment.
Leadership and transparent governance Providing opportunities to realize values Laying foundation for growth Responding to climate change Spread eco-friendly values Creating content with positive influence Supporting green growth ESG Vision ESG Pillars Key Initiative Enabler Leader of Change We create a world where everyone can realize their potential. We strive to preserve the environment and spread eco-friendly values. We create a society where various values are shared and coexist.
JYP Entertainment's ESG Vision Framework Change for the Planet Change for the Society ESG Vision : “Leader of Change” ESG Pillar 1 Change for the Dreamers ESG Pillar 3 Change for the Society ESG Pillar 2 Change for the Planet We champion the idea of opportunity that everyone can fly as high as they dream. JYP Entertainment aims to provide everyone who is motivated by our music with the opportunity to unleash their potential, thereby laying the foundation for new growth for our society as a whole. We believe everyone deserves the chance to achieve their dreams, and should not give up on them because of challenges or physical constraints. That is why we continue to expand our EDM social contribution activities and explore various ways for fans and the public can join in our effort. We also support talented people who aspire to change the world for the better with their music by creating a place they can expand their capabilities and make their dreams come true. We actively manage the challenges of climate change through environmentally-conscious management.
In order to protect the Earth, which is our home and the “dreaming planet,” we are committed to tackling climate change, starting with small but solid actions. We continue to manage the energy and power con-sumption of our headquarters, and plan to implement energy efficiency and energy reduction measures. In addition, we take part in the global effort toward carbon neutrality through the use of renewable energy.
We aim to create good content that sparks communication and connection and brings joy and positive changes into our society. JYP Entertainment strives to make the world a better place for all by creating and sharing good content. As part of this effort, starting 2022, we hold “SONGS THAT CARE” audition, in which we produce music that conveys much needed values in our society, such as coexistence and sharing. Additionally, we endeavor to build a platform that anyone can use anytime, anywhere to access our content and connect, while actively listening to fans and the public through online communication channels. We also strictly manage personal information used for communication and ensure people enjoy our creations safely and securely. We lay the groundwork for free and creative growth.
JYP Entertainment is for those who dream. And we cherish our culture where everyone can dream and fulfill their dreams, and where people with diverse backgrounds can freely share their thoughts and develop their talents. We empower employees through fair evaluation and compensation, and provide trainees with sys-tematic support so they can reach their dreams as artists. And our care program ensures they maintain physical and mental well-being along the way. We take the lead in promoting environmental value.
At JYP Entertainment, we do our best to communicate our environmental commitment and value not only to our stakeholders, but also to various communities around the world. We practice our commitment to envi-ronmental protection at the in-house restaurant and café, implement a variety of campaigns that convey our environmental value to the local community and people around the world who consume JYP’s music and content, and actively participate in the global environmental network so that environmental sustainability gains traction and keeps moving.
We live our values of coexistence and sharing. We are fair in sharing values with our partners and support their growth. So many creative partners from various fields make concerted efforts until one piece of music is ready to be released to the public. We give partners collaboration opportunities in a transparent and objective manner, and create shared values with them through continuous training, support, and exchange of ideas. We invest in early-stage start-ups and support them in settling within the JYP ecosystem and growing into potential business partners.
Board of Directors and subcommittee / Stakeholder engagement / Ethical management 36 ESG Framework 37 JYP Entertainment ESG Report 2021 ESG Organization ESG Committee In 2022, with the goal to take a systematic approach to realizing the ESG Vision “Leader of Change,” JYP Entertain-ment established the ESG Committee within the Board as a consultative body to discuss and decide on the overall di-rection of the company's environmental and social responsibility activities.
The ESG Committee plays a pivotal role in setting the direction of our medium- to long-term ESG strategy and mak-ing key decisions. The ESG Council is responsible for establishing/monitoring ESG management plans based on the medium- to long-term ESG direction, minimizing associated risks, and seeking out new business opportunities. And the ESG Taskforce (working group), which consists of functional representatives, closely communicates with the ESG Council depending on the agenda and executes ESG strategies linked to each function, thereby ensuring the ESG goals are attained.
The committee aims for transparent ESG management. To this end, three outside directors were appointed as members to enhance the committee’s independence, and their appointment is based on the extensive industry experience that they bring to our company to improve the expertise and competence of our creative business operations. JYP ESG FACTS 04 Environmental Social Governance 40 46 65 40 JYP ESG Facts 41 JYP Entertainment ESG Report 2021 Environmental Environmental management system Key Initiatives Strategy and system to implement environmentally friendly management • Direction for environmental management • Environmental management organization Environmental management system Minimizing environmental impact of business activities • Energy conservation • Transition to renewable energy Response to climate change Utilizing content for environmental awareness activities • Activities to reduce environmental footprint • Participating in global environmental network “1% for the Planet” • Bernard’s ECOFriends project • Environmental campaign “Love Earth Challenge” Promotion of environmental value The international community is paying more attention to environmental issues nowadays in line with the growing awareness of the need to transition to an en-vironmentally sustainable society to cope with climate change. A lot of environmental regulations are being established or reinforced as human sustainability is under threat, as evidenced by mounting signs: ozone layer depletion, environmental pollution, and resource depletion to name a few. In light of the current chal-lenges, companies are called on to adopt a new para-digm of corporate management to fulfill their growing environmental responsibility. The entertainment in-dustry is no exception in this respect. In addition to the demand for carbon neutrality, there is a growing voice in our industry advocating active participation of stakeholders who create and consume our music in environmental impact reduction efforts.
Background JYP Entertainment has established the environmental management system to set and manage environmental impact reduction goals. We are actively reducing our carbon footprint by shifting to renewable energy and continuously managing our environmental impact with the aim of achieving Net Zero for JYP Entertainment’s entire creative ecosystem. Furthermore, we drive cli-mate change awareness of the public by launching envi-ronmental campaigns featuring JYP artists for K-Pop fans around the world and for a sustainable future. Direction Recognizing the seriousness of environmental pollution and climate change, JYP Entertainment strives to incorporate environmental im-pact to all management activities and start working on what we can do to protect the environment. In this regard, we have set environ-mental management objectives aimed at minimizing environmental impacts and continue to carry out eco-friendly activities accordingly. Direction for environmental management We take a two-pronged approach to environmental management: responding to climate change and promoting environmental value. With regard to climate change response, our goal is to minimize our footprint across the board by conserving energy and switching to re-newable energy sources. In the future, we will further accelerate our effort by proactively managing greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions and seeking verification. Externally, we look to increase environmental awareness in our society in general, through participating in global environ-mental networks, producing environmental content featuring JYP artists, and hosting campaigns in which fans and artists participate. Environmental management organization JYP Entertainment has established a taskforce for environmental management under the ESG Council in order to enable a systematic and swift response to environmental issues. The environmental management taskforce sets energy conservation objectives every year, and continuously monitors the progress. Moreover, the organi-zation is accountable for planning and executing a variety of pro-grams to promote environmental values through close cooperation with the Artist Division. BOD ESG Committee ESG Council Environment Taskforce Activities to reduce GHG emissions 42 JYP ESG Facts 43 JYP Entertainment ESG Report 2021 Promotion of environmental value Response to climate change About RE100 RE100 is an acronym for “Rene wable Electricity 100%”, and is a voluntary campaign in which an enterprise commits to 100% renewable electricity either through purchase or in-house production. Renewable energy here refers to energy generated from PV, wind, hydroelectric power, geothermal energy, and any other natural source that can be used as alternative to fossil fuels. Launched in 2014 by the Climate Group and the Carbon Disclosure Project (CDP), RE100 brings together over 370 global companies including Google, Apple, and Nike. Among domestic companies are SK, Amorepacific, KB Financial Group, and K-water. JYP Entertainment makes efforts to use renewable energy and re-duce greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions while managing in-house energy consumption, in order to protect the environment and pre-serve the planet for our future generations to fully realize their dream. Energy conservation We manage and monitor the annual energy consumption, and ac-tively implement measures to conserve energy. As part of such ef-fort, in July 2020, we installed energy-efficient hot water boilers to reduce city gas consumption. This energy efficiency measure result-ed in a 14% reduction of city gas usage from 698GJ in 2020 to 600GJ in 2021. Transition to renewable energy To cope with the climate crisis, over 370 global companies are volun-tarily participating in the green initiative of RE100 to source 100 per-cent of their power from renewable energy, and the Korean govern-ment is also actively promoting RE100 with the goal of achieving carbon neutrality by 2050. As a member of the global initiative, in 2021, JYP Entertainment powered 100% of our electricity demand (1,393MWh) with solar PV energy. In other words, this means all al-bums recorded at the HQ in 2021 were made using 100 percent re-newable energy. The conservation can be translated into a 640tCO2eq reduction of GHG emissions, and brings us a step closer to Net Zero. To achieve this, JYP Entertainment purchased renewable energy cer-tificates (REC) under agreements with domestic solar power plants, becoming the first Korean entertainment company to fulfill RE100.
Activities to reduce environmental footprint The environmental conservation is a global issue that calls for global action and global solidarity. JYP Entertainment implements a wide range of programs within the organization and outside of it to reduce its environmental footprint. Environmentally-friendly albums and merchandise JYP Entertainment is serious about reducing the environmental im-pact of its content. We are working on various digital-only albums to replace physical CDs to reduce waste associated with physical al-bum purchases. Fans purchasing albums in the future will only re-ceive physical photo cards while being granted to access to all other included material such as songs, behind-the-scene content and lyr-ics through a digital code, and for this purpose, related technologies such as QR and NFC are being reviewed. We are also considering eco-friendly production options for photo cards. In parallel, we will redesign album packaging to minimize packag-ing materials and adopt FSC-certified paper, soy ink and eco-friend-ly coating materials in order to address the pollution problem posed by album packaging. We are looking to phase in eco-friendly merchandise as well. We will actively utilize green materials such as biodegradable plastic made from nature and upcycling products using discarded waste, and expand the reusable products that can be reused several times, such as clothes, eco-bags and tumblers using natural materials. To this end, we will also work hard to create social value by reviewing cooperation with social enterprises and social ventures in various ways.
As such, JYP Entertainment is creating a K-pop culture where the entertainment industry and the environment can continue to co-ex-ist through creating content that promotes environmental value. Operating eco-friendly cafe JYP-Soulcup JYP-Soulcup is our in-house café and an eco-friendly complex cul-tural space, driven by its motto “Love You More, Love Earth”. Through the cafe, we aim to practice sustainability-led behavior in every aspect of the business, from purchasing raw materials to op-eration.
JYP-Soulcup uses eco-friendly ingredients and materials wherever possible to minimize its impact on the environment. By increasing the proportion of organic and pesticide-free raw materials up to 80%, we reduced the environmental impact of the material purchas-ing process. We also use eco-friendly materials in our manufactur-ing and packaging stages to reduce our carbon footprint and plastic waste. Disposable plastic (PP) was replaced with eco-friendly plas-tic (PLA), and regular paper cups were replaced with paper cups made of sugar cane and bamboo pulp. Meanwhile, we encourage the use of reusable containers rather than disposable cups as a way to reduce waste. We aim to increase the proportion of tumbler use by 20% through customer discounts and campaigns, and reduce 12,000 disposable cups per year through active use of multi-use containers.
Operating 'JYP BOB', on-site restaurant with minimal environmental impact JYP BOB is a cafeteria for JYP employees and artists, and we par-ticipate in environmental impact reduction activities by providing an eco-friendly diet and minimizing food waste.
We use eco-friendly ingredients that are organic, pesticide-free, and antibiotic-free, and choose eco-friendly products wherever possible to minimize the impact on the environment. Also, utensils and cut-lery that emit environmental hormones are not used.
In a bid to reduce food waste, we operate a reservation system, small-amount staggered cooking, and buffet line setup. We also en-courage employees to join our efforts through self-dispensing, al-lowing them to take only as much food as needed. Unavoidable food waste is collected by recycling companies for composting, and a food disposal performance report is submitted every year. We make sure waste cooking oil is also treated in an eco-friendly manner through a service provider. Only when the envi-ronmental problems are addressed at the regional level can they be addressed at the country level, and then, at the global level. 1% for the Planet member companies donate 1% of their annual sales to local grassroots environmental organizations. As a member of 1% for the Planet, JYP Entertainment donated 1% of JYP-Soulcup sales to Our Sea of East Asia Network (OCEAN) to promote the importance of protecting the global environment.

JYP Entertainment has been a member since 2020 and working in soli-darity with domestic and foreign environmental organizations to solve environmental problems. By donating 1% of the sales of the in-house café JYP-Soulcup to Our Sea of East Asia Network (OCEAN), we strive to protect the marine environment. Donation was used to publish “Im-pacts of Marine Litter on Biodiversity II> and distribute it to 29 govern-ment agencies, including Korea Maritime Environment Management Corporation, National Institute of Fisheries Science, and Korea Mari-time Institute, and we posted the publication in the PDF format on our website to raise awareness of marine litter. Artist’s Environmental Project : “Bernard’s ECOFriends” JYP Entertainment practices environmental protection and pro-motes our activities to share our values with everyone to build a healthier place to live. As part of such effort, we produced Bernard’s ECOFriends, which sheds light on the activities of those who strive to protect the Earth. Bernard’s ECOFriends is a project where JYP artist Bernard Park introduces what we can do to save the planet and conveys the value. For seven months from May to December 2021, we selected differ-ent environmental themes every month, including eco-friendly farming methods, urban beekeeping, beach cleanup, and native seeds, and produced a total of 14 films, one artist experience epi-sode and a song cover each per theme. Other JYP artists and envi-ronmental activists joined as guests to help raise awareness of the importance of activities and encourage the participation of fans and the public.
The videos were released on JYP Entertainment's official YouTube channel and shared with people interested in the environment and all users of JYP Entertainment's music content. Through such content that combines music and nature, we exerted a positive influence on those who were interested in environmental is-sues but did not know where to start.
Environmental campaign “Love Earth Challenge” Since 2020, JYP Entertainment has been organizing Love Earth Challenge, an environmental campaign to revive the earth for life so that everyone can lead a healthy life and pursue their dream. The challenge also commemorates the International Coastal Cleanup Day every year by proposing specific initiatives to protect the marine environment, which has become the final destination for waste. JYP artists and fans participate in the SNS campaign to raise marine environmental awareness and take actions to protect the earth. In 2020, we encouraged the use of tumblers, which can be easily practiced in daily life, by holding the TUMBLER FOR EARTH chal-lenge on SNS, and JYP artists and 840 fans participated in the chal-lenge. In addition, in 2021, we organized the CLEAN SWELL cam-paign, in which 1,100 artists and fans picked up garbage and properly separated it for the purpose of reducing the amount of gar-bage being discharged into the sea. In order to bring about a more substantial change, JYP matched the number of posts in the cam-paign and the number of views for the episode 4 of Bernard’s ECOF-riends, Bernard protects the sea, with KRW 30 million in donation to Our Sea of East Asia Network (OCEAN). This donation was used to clean up 21 beaches and the Han River in Seoul, collecting a total of 4,731 kg of garbage. Going forward, all employees and artists of JYP Entertainment will sincerely participate in environmental protection activities, contributing to keeping our planet healthy.

The evolution of the entertainment industry through convergence with other industries has ex-panded the scope of stakeholders and, therefore, raised the importance of ESG management across the creative process. As a member of the society, we also have the responsibility to address various social is-sues, while realizing shared growth. Background Direction JYP Entertainment cheers for everyone working to real-ize their dreams, and has in place a system to support them. We endeavor to strengthen the competitiveness of our employees and partners that are part of our creative ecosystem, cultivate an environment where we can grow together, and establish a fair and transparent creative ecosystem. In addition, we actively engage in social con-tribution activities and contribute to bringing a positive change to society through producing good contents. And we keep the information security system up to date so that everyone can enjoy our contents in a safe environ-ment. Key Initiatives Building a pleasant workplace for all • Talent recruitment and development program • Employee diversity and human rights management • Appraisal and compensation system • Organizational programs and culture to promote work-life balance • Safe work environment Employees Pursuing shared growth with partners • Shared growth system for partners • Partner selection and operation • Partner support program and performance Partners User protection and support • Personal information protection and information security • User accessibility improvement • Expansion of digital communication channel Users Activities for realizing an inclusive society • EDM social contribution program • Local community donations • Social contents production Local community Talent recruitment JYP Entertainment believes people are the most valuable asset for a company, and does its best to recruit and develop talented people. People are our core growth engine and play a vital role in making the company a leader in the entertainment business. At JYP Entertainment, key senior management participates in the hiring process to recruit talented people who have good personality as well as practical skillsets, and a personality test is given to as-sess candidates from various angles. Furthermore, we adopt a blind recruitment process for creative positions to focus more on individ-uals’ creativity and ensure fairness.
More staff come on board as the company grows, and we plan to in-crease recruitment in 2022. In contrast, employee turnover rate declined and was nine percent as of the first half of 2022. We expect the average tenure to gradually increase accordingly. When individual employees determine the goals and methods of their growth, we empower them by providing appropriate resources.
We offer a learning platform that includes more than 6,000 learning courses, including job skills, foreign languages, and cultural com-petence, so that employees can drive their own learning in desired fields at their own pace. Plus, we support employees’ development through conferences, external training and book purchase allow-ances. Going forward, we plan to establish a leadership development pro-gram from a mid- to long-term perspective by defining the leader-ship skillsets and values required of each position and providing a wide range of training opportunities to support employees. Employee diversity JYP Entertainment is a company where talented people are gath-ered to blossom, achieve their dreams, and grow with the company. As of the first half of 2022, we have a total of 295 employees, of which 96 percent, or 285 employees, work on a full-time basis. We look out for people with both creativity and good personality, and work hard to cultivate a culture that respects all employees as tal-ent. We are creating an environment where talented people with di-verse backgrounds and experiences can make creative music and content with flexible thinking.
JYP Entertainment has endeavored to build a workplace where fe-male talent can grow. As of the first half of 2022, about 62 percent of the workforce was female. In addition, a female executive director was appointed in 2021 to strengthen the leadership of female talent, and 75 percent of the newly appointed team heads in 2022 were fe-male, raising the ratio of female managers to 42 percent as of the first half of 2022. Going forward, we will continue to implement work-life balance policies such as parental leaves and encourage female employees to grow their career into leadership positions. As for employee diversity, we actively expand the recruitment of nation-al meritorious persons and foreign nationals. As of the first half of 2022, there were six national meritorious persons and six foreign na-tionals on our payroll, accounting for 4% of the workforce. We also hire talent on a full-time basis wherever possible, and only two employees (part-time workers), or one percent of the workforce, were non-regular workers during the same period. JYP ESG Facts 51 JYP Entertainment ESG Report 2021 Employees Human rights management Operating human rights protection channel JYP Entertainment operates a human rights grievance handling channel in order to prevent workplace harassment, including sexual harassment, and protect the human rights of all employees. The company clearly states in the work rule what constitutes misconduct in the course of employment, and when a concern arises, the respon-sible team efficiently addresses the issue in accordance with internal regulations and transparently shares the result with the informant.
Human rights education At JYP Entertainment, company-wide statutory training is conduct-ed every year on sexual harassment prevention, workplace harass-ment prevention, disability awareness, personal information protec-tion, and ethical management. We consistently emphasize the importance of such training to raise the awareness of human rights among the employees, and we will continue to implement human rights education programs in a systematic way. Compliance with human rights law Our continuous effort to conform to the Code of Conduct and protect human rights has resulted in zero violation of human rights law in the past three years (2019 to 2021). We will continue to conduct our business with respect for employees. Human rights complaints are handled by the Grievance Committee and Human Resources Committee, which operate independently to ensure adequate protection of informants. When a report is received through the grievance handling channel, the two committees review and investigate the case privately and agree on a solution. Based on this, we consult with the informant and determine on the final solution. The company takes the protection of victims very seriously in this process. We make every effort to protect the informant and maintain confidentiality through the entire process, and ensure vic-tims are not subject to disadvantages or discrimination even after the case is closed. We ensure Leader’s Code is embedded in our HR appraisal system and provide employees equal opportunities for pro-motion, compensation, and benefits.
We foster talent in line with the company's vision by incorporating the six core values in the Leader's Code into the employee assessment category. We implemented the MBO HR program in 2012 to assess in-dividual contributions and performances together with the company’s growth objectives, and we have since assisted employees in achieving best performance and personal growth goals. A multi-faceted leader-ship assessment is conducted as well in order to address improve-ment gaps based on employee feedback on leaders, and to comple-ment the top-down HR-driven process with the voices of employees. Moreover, we enhance the fairness and transparency of the appraisal system through the Performance Management Committee, which de-livers objective appraisals for each organization by carefully looking at the level of performance, environmental difficulty, and stretch goal A report is filed through the online channel Informant interview is carried out and final solution is determined The case is reviewed to come up with a solution STEP 1 STEP 2 STEP 3 Human rights complaints handling process setting. The Committee also plays a role in assisting the company in responding to the rapidly changing business landscape by coordinat-ing and adjusting business strategies and goals in a timely manner in alignment with company-wide objectives. The committee members engage in in-depth examination and discussion to enhance the fair-ness of the appraisal results while striving to promote a culture of communication and engagement across the organization. At JYP Entertainment, individual employees and the company set the objectives together and compensation is decided by comprehensively considering contributions and performances. By doing so, we ensure fair appraisal and compensation for individual efforts and competen-cies, without discrimination based on job level, placement, or gender.
We are continuously improving compensation to meet employee ex-pectations and motivate performance. Guided by the value of “One JYP Entertainment”, we earmark a certain portion of the company’s profits and share it with all employees under the company-wide profit sharing plan. This incentive system not only motivates employees to work better, but also is conducive to promoting an environment in which individual employees grow together with the company.

Flexible work arrangements Taking into consideration the characteristics of the entertainment industry where people work with high levels of autonomy and cre-ativity, we introduced flexible work arrangements. Employees can voluntarily set core work hours depending on the intensity and du-ties of their work, and fix their own work schedule on a monthly ba-sis. The core time-based flexible work hours, which was imple-mented before the COVID-19 pandemic, contribute to improving work efficiency and work-life balance. Mental well-being programs JYP Entertainment has in place a mental-wellbeing program to pro-mote mental well-being and health of employees. The program consists of face-to-face counseling and online counseling programs with a professional psychologist. The face-to-face counseling is one-on-one sessions, and allows for convenient counseling through video conference or in a separate space. Benefit programs JYP Entertainment operates a wide range of benefit programs to ensure employees lead an abundant and stable life. The in-house restaurant “JYP BOB,” in particular, provides lunch and dinner on organic diet on weekdays. This not only promotes the health and productivity of employees and healthy growth of trainees, but also plays an important role in improving employee satisfaction.

Under the slogan “You are what you eat,” the restaurant provides all organic meals with the aim of improving employees’ health and work productivity, as well as promoting healthy development and positive eating habits of trainees. The restaurant has been operating since July 2, 2018 when the company moved to the current JYP Center in Gangdong, Seoul. You Are What You Eat!
Principles of JYP BOB • We serve organic, sustainable food. We mainly use eco-friendly ingredients, including domestic organically grown produce. We’re proud to serve a healthy meal even at higher costs than other restaurants. • We consider health in every step of food preparation. Our cooking or eating utensils are made with stainless, ceramics, glass, tritan, and silicon, and do not produce environmental hormones. We also use eco-friendly grade 1 dish soaps. • Safety and hygiene are our top priorities. Industrial safety & hygiene education is offered to JYP BOB workers every month, and kitchen hygiene education is also conducted regularly. Furthermore, a third-party hygiene check is performed twice a year in our effort to provide clean and safe food. Hearty & healthy food, just like home-cooked meals Horizontal organizational culture Adopting mutually respectful honorific expression JYP Entertainment embraces a horizontal organizational culture for employees to communicate freely based on mutual respect, and en-courages employees to address each other with the honorific suffix “nim” regardless of job titles instead of honorific titles. This enables employees to communicate horizontally and respect each other without feeling bound by the vertical hierarchy of age or position. Flexible seating We have flexible seating arrangements to let members work collab-oratively and engage in conversation easily. The flexible seating op-tion allows employees to choose where they want to work, stimulat-ing impromptu encounters and inspiring creativity along the way. In addition, our office zoning gives everyone a functional space, such as focus zone, collaboration space, rest area, and phone booth. Employees 54 JYP ESG Facts 55 JYP Entertainment ESG Report 2021 Safe work environment JYP Entertainment strives to ensure people enjoy our music in a safe environment. To this end, in 2022, we newly formed the safety and health organization and implemented a relevant management system in response to the Industrial Safety and Health Act and Serious Accidents Punishment Act. Occupational safety and Health JYP Entertainment conducts risk assessment through a third party company to identify potential risk factors in the workplace, prevent industrial accidents, and ensure a safe environment for our employ-ees. Emergency safety supplies, including fire evacuation masks, are also available to prevent evacuation delays or casualties in the event of a fire. Additionally, we raise safety awareness through providing statutory training in accordance with the Occupational Safety and Health Act, including generic safety and health training and job-specific training for health and safety managers.
Operating Occupational Safety and Health Committee JYP Entertainment operates the Occupational Safety and Health Committee as a safety communication channel for a safe working environment. In accordance with the Industrial Safety and Health Act, it convenes on a quarterly basis to deliver and resolve safety and health related matters. Through operating the Committee, we discuss and address all safe-ty matters, including legal requirements, risk factors in the work-place, and contagious disease prevention, and make continuous ef-forts to maintain a safe work environment. Employee health management JYP Entertainment inspects the physical condition of the workplace for hazard recognition in order to reduce the risk of employees de-veloping a musculoskeletal disorder and promote their health. In addition, we partner with a personal training facility and dental-clinic and provide comprehensive medical checkups and flu vacci-nations to help employees maintain their health. Ensuring safety for events and performances For a safe and pleasant event, JYP Entertainment makes sure that everyone on site, including artists and performers, audiences, and staff members, complies with legal safety standards. We carry out continuous and meticulous safety checks from before the onset of the event until after the event finishes. Establishing safety culture We plan to maintain a safe environment by conducting safety in-spections and improvement activities based on safety standards, and by promptly mitigating gaps in each area through continuous evaluation. We will develop emergency response manuals for differ-ent crisis situations, such as fire, collapse, and natural disaster, and perform drills in a consistent manner, so as to improve our organi-zational emergency preparedness. We will also accelerate our effort to foster a safety culture through employee engagement activities, including safety bulletin board as a communication channel and safety campaigns. In a bid to ensure fairness and transparency in our relationships with partners, we have set partner selection and management standards, and published a comprehensive guideline that governs all areas from contract sign-ing to follow-up after closing. JYP Entertainment see our partners not just as collaborators, but equal allies sharing growth. We will continue to provide partners with fair and transparent busi-ness opportunities as well as a variety of support programs, while driving a mutually beneficial culture.

Code of Conduct for partners JYP Entertainment has enacted the JYP Fair Cooperation Guide for Partners, which defines the underlying principles of mutual trust, fair trade, and shared growth. The guide is JYP Entertainment’s commitment to fulfilling our responsibilities for fair trading and eth-ical management based on mutual trust with partners. The guide also serves as a code of conduct for all partners and the foundation for us to practice transparent and ethical management together.

Initial-stage startup investment JYP Entertainment invests in early-stage companies and small and medium venture businesses through investment associations as a limited partner. JYP also utilizes Trost as its online psychological counseling service as part of the employee mental well-being program. 58 JYP ESG Facts 59 JYP Entertainment ESG Report 2021 Personal information protection and information security JYP Entertainment uses its best efforts to protect personal informa-tion and securely manage sensitive information. We have implement-ed an information security system and taken various measures to protect personal information acquired through our business opera-tions as per our privacy protection policy. We will maintain a high level of security so that users can consume JYP Entertainment's contents in a safe environment protected from the threat of data breaches. Information security system We maintain 24/7 monitoring of the servers in operation through an information security service provider. Ongoing efforts are made as well to replace security programs or upgrade security control sys-tems. In addition, we control external intrusion utilizing intrusion prevention system, and do our best to be equipped with all possible technological instruments to ensure system security. In 2022, we plan to roll out the highest level of security program (Microsoft Defender based on CIS/NIST control) to phase in an ad-vanced information security system.
Privacy policy JYP Entertainment has established and implemented an internal management plan for the safe handling of collected personal infor-mation. We are committed to complying with the Privacy Protection Act, the Promotion of the Use of Information and Communication Networks and Protection of Information Act, and all other relevant laws and regulations. The compliance status as well as the imple-mentation of personal information protection measures is checked by the relevant team and IT personnel, who also take corrective ac-tions immediately for any issues identified. The company plans to further strengthen privacy protection by setting up a dedicated per-sonal information protection organization.
We aim to improve company-wide information security awareness through providing employees with information protection training. Over the past three years, a total of 749 employees have received statutory personal information protection training, either online or on-site. Fur-thermore, we are the only entertainment agency in Korea that con-ducts cyber threat simulation training for employees jointly with the Korea Internet & Security Agency (KISA) every year. For employees who handle personal information as part of their job, we provide regu-lar in-house training or external training to help them acquire new se-curity technologies and understand the privacy data protection duty, and in so doing, minimize administrative risk of personal data leakage. Personal information protection measures We take all the technological, administrative, and physical mea-sures necessary to ensure the safety of handling personal informa-tion, and are responding with detailed plans. In addition, in case of complaints related to personal information, we designate and oper-ate a department that handles them.
Personal information protection status At JYP Entertainment, there has been no incident or damage due to information leakage in the past three years. There have not been any data breach cases involving user information or any fines in-curred due to violation of information protection laws as well. We will spare no effort in maintaining a high level of information protec-tion through raising security awareness across the organization and strengthening the server security level. We are focusing on improving the experience for music fans with disabilities who often have difficulty in booking a concert or accessing venue and facilities. For those with limited mobility, accessible tickets are reserved through telephone booking lines, separately from general reservations. We provide two seats for wheelchair users and their companions, and train on-site personnel to support as needed so that they can enjoy the performance to the full. Going forward, we will continue to work to make more accessible and inclusive events by considering various aspects and ensure people with disabilities can enjoy the performances without any inconvenience.
As our stage expands worldwide, we have improved accessibility for overseas users by lowering language barriers. Nowadays our content is consumed not just by domestic fans, but fans across the world – from Japan and China to Southeast Asia, North America, Latin America and Europe. Acknowledging this, we have added Japanese and Chinese language options as well as Korean and English on our company website, and JYP official YouTube channel supports Spanish and various Asian languages including Vietnamese, Thai, and Hindi, making our content more accessible for a wider global audience. In the future, we will further promote accessibility of overseas users through expanding virtual concerts on the Beyond LIVE, an online live performance platform we introduced in 2020. Expanding digital communication channels JYP Entertainment believes listening to fans is about connecting with them. We leverage various digital channels to facilitate communication between artists and fans. Artists frequently communicate with their fans by gong live on YouTube, Instagram and other SNS platforms, or using artist-to-fan engagement platforms such as Bubble and V LIVE. Fans can subscribe to the channel of their favorite artists, message them or leave comments. Through this experience, fans can feel a deep sense of connection with the artists beyond boundaries.
For communication with Generation Z, we actively utilize the metaverse platform Zepeto. In the virtual space within the platform, fans meet with JYP artists in a new form of experiential communica-tion, such as taking pictures or practicing choreography together. We also operate JYP Fan’s, the official fan community, and use it as an official communication channel with fans. Users may request tickets for TV shows here and get a chance to sit in the audience and see art-ists in person. As such, various digital channels serve as a reliable means of communication and maximizes user satisfaction. At the company level, we receive various opinions and feedback from fans through JYP Entertainment's official communication email (fan@jype.com), and a marketing manager who is dedicated to communicating with fans is assigned for each artist. Fan marketing managers constantly monitor domestic and overseas K-Pop markets to gain insights, deliver updates on artists in the fastest and most efficient way, and establish fan engagement strat-egies tailored to the evolving trend to facilitate communication be-tween fans and artists. The company defines the communication network for each artist so that various opinions of users are collected and appropriate pre-emptive actions are taken as needed by fan marketing managers. They also monitor each artist's channel at all times and coordinate communication with fans for TV shows or performances. We strive to better understand what fans want through conducting surveys on fan meetings and surveys. [ITZY _ LIVE] “Cooking show,” on-trend theme for fan engagement ITZY hosted a special live cooking show with fans on its official YouTube channel for about three months. Every Sunday at 6 p.m., starting with the youngest member Yuna, the five members took turns to make the menu recommended by fans, while communicating with them. After the live broadcast finished, an event was held in which fans uploaded their own cooking of ITZY’s recipe, and ITZY “liked” the one that has the most resemblance to their dish. Through the cooking show, ITZY not only was able to connect closely with the users of the content, but also created special content for its fandom MIDZY. Under the memorandum of understanding (MOU) signed with Sam-sung Medical Center in August 2020, JYP Entertainment has cov-ered treatment costs for low-income children in Korea, by paying for surgery, orphan drugs, medical devices and treatment (chemotherapy, transplantation, rehabilitation, etc.) for children who suffer from a childhood cancer or rare incurable disease. In 2020 and 2021, our do-nation totaled KRW 450 million, which benefited 41 children.
Building upon the work, we have expanded the reach of our pro-gram worldwide and supported the treatment of children who need our help. In 2021, we signed an MOU with World Vision to start car-ing for the lives of overseas patients. Joined also by JYP Japan, our overseas medical treatment support program has saved the lives of 313 overseas children in Mongolia, the Philippines, Bangladesh, and Vietnam.

EDM wish granting program status Classification Unit 2019 2020 2021 Total JYP Entertainment donation KRW in thousand 324,500 300,000 170,000 794,500 JYP Fan’s EDM debit card donation -21,164 13,737 34,901 EDM website donation 1,912 17,552 11,077 30,541 Total 326,412 338,716 194,814 859,942 EDM wish granting activity volunteer Person 161 209 171 541 Recipient children 50 60 71 181 EDM wish granting program The EDM wish granting program is an emotional support program tar-geting children aged 3-18 years with an incurable disease at home and abroad. Through the program, we instill them with the power to over-come their disease and the courage to dream by granting them a wish. We signed an MOU with Make a Wish Korea in 2019, and for the period from 2019 to 2021, we donated a total of KRW 790 million to support the dreams of 181 children with incurable diseases.
Through our program, we grant life-changing wishes to children in five categories: “To meet,” “To have,” “To do,” “To go,” and “To become”. In our effort to grant “To meet” wishes despite the COVID-19 situa-tion, we held an “Online Wish Day” in 2021 for domestic and over-seas children who wanted to meet with JYP artists. Through the vid-eo calls, artists delivered warm support for the children’s fight against critical illness, and children gained unforgettable memory and renewed strength. Wonpil (DAY6), TWICE, Stray Kids, and ITZY participated in this activity to grant the wishes of 11 children with intractable illness.
The EDM wish granting program carries even more special meaning in that fans can also participate together. When they use the JYP Fan's EDM debit card from Shinhan Card, a share of their purchas-es is automatically donated to EDM social contribution activities. The money collected is then donated in the name of JYP artists and fandom and is used for wish granting for children with incurable diseases. In addition, domestic and overseas fans can donate directly on our JYP_EDM website, where we operate the “Donation for Children” fundraising with stories of children fighting serious illness and the “EDM Anniversary Donation” fundraising for celebrating meaningful days. As such, JYP Entertainment engages in a wide range of activi-ties on various platforms to spread its “positive influence” with fans.

As more focus is placed on transparency in corporate governance, companies are faced with a growing demand from government agen-cies and investment facilities. In today’s business landscape, businesses need to improve their gover-nance structure continuously so as to promote share-holder value and take a balanced approach to share-holder rights protection.
Background JYP Entertainment has restructured its governance structure, which becomes the foundation of corporate development. We have formed a competent, independent and diverse Board of Directors (BOD) and established the ESG Committee with the aim of realizing responsibil-ity management supported by a rational decision making process, establishing a system for ethical management, and reinforcing trust with various stakeholders. A resolution of the BOD is made when a majority of the directors are in attendance and by a majority vote of the directors in attendance. In 2021, the BOD convened 10 times to endorse important matters such as establishing subsidiar-ies and granting stock options.
Expertise and diversity of BOD JYP Entertainment's executive directors are professionals with mul-tiple years of experience in the entertainment industry. Independent directors consist of experts from various fields, such as accounting, finance, law, and investment. Tapping into its rich experience and knowledge, the BOD deliberates and resolves on its agenda, and ef-ficiently monitors management’s activities and performance. In March 2022, a new female independent director was appointed, raising the ratio of female directors in the Board to 25 percent. We will accelerate our efforts to increase the expertise and diversity of the BOD.
Independence of BOD We ensure that BOD members (excluding Audit Committee mem-bers) are independent of the company's largest or major sharehold-ers. We continuously increased the ratio of independent directors, and brought it up to 50 percent with new independent director ap-pointment in 2022, further enhancing the independence of the BOD. The director appointment process requires the company to disclose the personal information of the candidate prior to the shareholders’ meeting as well as whether the candidate has any shareholder rec-ommendation. As of December 31 2021, a total of 35,497,492 common shares were issued, and the number of treasury shares that do not carry voting power by the Commercial Law was 2,399,433. Protecting shareholder rights We encourage shareholders to exercise their rights at the general shareholders’ meeting by sharing significant information in advance wherever we can. In 2020, we introduced an electronic voting system in accordance with relevant law to allow shareholders to cast their vote even when they do not physically attend the shareholders’ meeting, enhancing the convenience of shareholders. JYP Enter-tainment considers the electronic voting system an alternative means that can further strengthen the company’s competitiveness by promoting shareholder participation and reducing social cost. Going forward, we will continue to promote electric voting to ensure participation rights of more shareholders. In addition to the electronic voting system, we became the first in the industry to pay cash dividends as part of our shareholder return policy. We have been implementing the dividend policy since 2018 by com-prehensively taking into consideration corporate growth, profit lev-els, and fund management to improve corporate value and share-holder return together. Furthermore, we transparently disclose stock information, financial statements, disclosures, internal infor-mation control regulation, and ethics guideline through IR section of our company website. Ethics Guideline JYP Entertainment endeavors to become a trusted company that fulfills its responsibilities and duties as a member of the entertainment industry by complying with laws, ethical standards, and social norms. To that end, we have developed the Ethics Guideline for fair and transparent corpo-rate management, and defined core values and standards of conduct that must be adhered to by all members as a whole to become a re-spectable company in our society. The Ethics Guideline was revised as of December 1 2021, and its five chapters contain general provisions, fair performance of duty, property and information protection, fan engage-ment, and self-reporting and reporting. Ethical management system Our ethical management system is implemented mainly by HR/Gen-eral Affairs, Legal, and Accounting that are affiliated with the Man-agement Support Office of the Business Support Division. The sys-tem facilitates ethical management and compliance management and promotes compliance value across the organization. In 2022, we plan to further strengthen the ethical management system by facili-tating communication between the newly-appointed Compliance Of-ficer and relevant teams. Ethics training We conduct ethics management training for all employees as well as new hires. Organized by HR/General Affairs and conducted online once a year, the ethics training aims to promote awareness on the importance of ethical management and its practice, as well as help build an ethical mindset. In 2021, 271 employees received the ethics training and they spent an average of eight hours each doing it. There were no reports of ethics violation received through the hotline. We established the Audit Committee within the BOD for transparent management of the Board, and the Committee consists only of independent direc-tors to ensure its independent decision making. In 2022, we newly established the Compensation Committee and the ESG Committee to strengthen the soundness and sustainability of corporate man-agement. Audit Committee The Audit Committee is comprised of all independent directors for its independence, and includes accounting and financial experts in accordance with the relevant provisions of the Commercial Law. The composition, operation and authority, and responsibilities of the Committee are specified in the Audit Committee regulation, which also becomes the guidelines for audit activities. The Audit Commit-tee receives reports from the accounting control manager and is re-sponsible for reviewing the operation status of the internal account-ing management system, which is designed to prepare and disclose accounting information in a credible and reliable manner. Compensation Committee The Compensation Committee evaluates the management perfor-mance and sets the level of compensation for executives according-ly. Going forward, we will establish a balanced and reasonable com-pensation system and continuously improve it based on mid to long-term profitability and risk projections, ensuring appropriate levels and types of incentives to executives. ESG Committee The ESG Committee aims to actively respond to the evolving busi-ness landscape and pursue sustainable management. The ESG Committee, which comprises all of independent directors, plays a critical role in decision-making related to ESG activities, such as setting ESG strategic direction and establishing a management roadmap. We have also in place the ESG Council and ESG Taskforce. The ESG Council manages the performance and indicators of ESG projects executed by the Taskforce organization, and reviews and reports various ESG-related agenda to the Committee. The ESG Taskforce sets and executes the ESG visions in alignment with the strategic direction set by the Committee, and drives various ESG activities accordingly. Compliance Officer A listed company is required to appoint a compliance officer who meets certain qualifications to ensure the company’s business ac-tivities fall within legal regulations and internal policies. JYP Enter-tainment appointed the compliance officer for the first time in 2022. The compliance officer prevents and manages legal risks of the company and ensures business activities are carried out legally and efficiently. Improving content accessibility for the socially marginalized JYP Entertainment conduct a materiality test to identify and priori-tize major sustainability topics based on the Core Option of the GRI Sustainability Reporting Standards and other international ESG evaluation standards. We are committed to regularly conducting sustainability materiality assessments, and sharing the results with stakeholders through this report. Assessment process We have identified topics of materials importance by reviewing each issue for business impact and stakeholders’ interest. Step 1. Issue pool creation We created a pool of 28 issues through analyzing global sustainabil-ity standards (i.e., GRI Standards, SASB, and TCFD), ESG indexes (MSCI ESG ratings, KCGS), sustainability issues handled by domes-tic/overseas peer groups, and media research results. Step 2. Materiality evaluation of the sustainability issues We analyzed the 28 issues in the pool on the two criteria as below: •  Business impact: Evaluating the impact each issue may have on JYP Entertainment’s reputation, sales and strategy - Internal data and disclosures/press release screening -  Research on ESG awareness of employees and impact of each issue (Jan to Feb 2022) • Stakeholder interest: Evaluating the importance of each issue through media research analysis and internal/external stakehold-er survey (employees, users, investors, partners, and local com-munities) - External stakeholder survey (May 2022) - Media exposure analysis for the period of June 2021 to May 2022 Step 3. Focus issue selection & validation We selected 11 focus issues based on business impact and stake-holder interest, and reviewed these sustainability issues for their validity through the ESG Taskforce. Assessment results A total of 11 sustainability issues were selected as a result of the assessment. Stakeholders were aware of the global expansion of the Korean entertainment industry, and chose “stable development of artists” and “communication with fans” as the key factors directly linked to JYP Entertainment’s sustainability. Given the significant influence partners have on the business, stakeholders highlighted the importance of supplier network man-agement capability in terms of stability. The results of the materiali-ty assessment confirmed the ESG direction and social responsibility required of us, and we reflected in this report our key initiatives and response strategies for each of the highly material issues. SASB standards use the Sustainable Industry Classification System (SICS) to group companies into 77 industries across 11 thematic sectors, and JYP Entertainment falls into Internet media & Service and Media & En-tertainment industries under the Service category. The company transparently discloses relevant information to stakeholders in alignment with SASB Standards. •Developing Internal ethics guidelines for fairness and transparency •Completing mandatory 12-hour training on human rights protection for all employees (total training hours: 3,252) Ⅳ.2.(1) Employees Ⅳ.3.(3) Ethical management (16.10) Ensure public access to information and protect fundamental freedoms, in accordance with national legislation and international agreements.
•Providing multilingual content and leveraging digital platforms •Establishing personal information protection and information security system Ⅳ.2(4) Users (17.17) Encourage and promote effective public, public-private and civil society partnerships, building on the experience and resourcing strategies of partnerships.
•Signing MOU with Samsung Medical Center for medical treatment support for domestic children •Signing MOU with World Vision for medical treatment support for overseas children •Signing MOU with Make-A-Wish Korea for CSR programs targeting children with incurable disease •Joining global environmental network ‘1% for the Planet’ •Participating in marine environmental protection activities in collaboration with OCEAN (Our Sea of East Asia Network Ⅳ.1.(2) Climate change response Ⅳ.2.(2) Local communities 82 Appendix 83 JYP Entertainment ESG Report 2021 To readers of JYP Entertainment ESG Report 2021 Introduction Korea Management Registrar (KMR) was commissioned by JYP En-tertainment to conduct an independent assurance of its ESG Report 2021 (the “Report”). The data and its presentation in the Report is the sole responsibility of the management of JYP Entertainment. KMR’s responsibility is to perform an assurance engagement as agreed upon in our agreement with JYP Entertainment and issue an assurance statement. Scope and Standards JYP Entertainment described its sustainability performance and ac-tivities in the Report. Our Assurance Team carried out an assurance engagement in accordance with the AA1000AS v3 and KMR’s assur-ance standard SRV1000. We are providing a Type 2, moderate level assurance. We evaluated the adherence to the AA1000AP (2018) principles of inclusivity, materiality, responsiveness and impact, and the reliability of the information and data provided using the Global Reporting Initiative (GRI) Index provided below. The opinion ex-pressed in the Assurance Statement has been formed at the mate-riality of the professional judgment of our Assurance Team.
Confirmation that the Report was prepared in accordance with the Core Options of the GRI standards was included in the scope of the assurance. We have reviewed the topic-specific disclosures of stan-dards which were identified in the materiality assessment process •GRI Sustainability Reporting Standards •Universal standards •Topic specific standards - Management approach of Topic Specific Standards - GRI 412: Human Rights Assessment - GRI 413: Local Communities As for the reporting boundary, the engagement excludes the data and information of JYP Entertainment’ partners, suppliers and any third parties.
KMR's Approach To perform an assurance engagement within an agreed scope of assessment using the standards outlined above, our Assurance Team undertook the following activities as part of the engagement: •reviewed the overall Report; • reviewed materiality assessment methodology and the assess-ment report • evaluated sustainability strategies, performance data manage-ment system, and processes •interviewed people in charge of preparing the Report • reviewed the reliability of the Report's performance data and con-ducted data sampling • assessed the reliability of information using independent external sources such as Financial Supervisory Service’s DART and public databases. Limitations and Recommendations KMR’s assurance engagement is based on the assumption that the data and information provided by JYP Entertainment to us as part of our review are provided in good faith. Limited depth of evidence gathering including inquiry and analytical procedures and limited sampling at lower levels in the organization were applied. To ad-dress this, we referred to independent external sources such as DART and National Greenhouse Gas Management System (NGMS) and public databases to challenge the quality and reliability of the information provided.
Conclusion and Opinion Based on the document reviews and interviews, we had several dis-cussions with JYP Entertainment on the revision of the Report. We reviewed the Report’s final version in order to make sure that our recommendations for improvement and revision have been reflect-ed. Based on the work performed, it is our opinion that the Report applied the Core Option of the GRI Standards. Nothing comes to our attention to suggest that the Report was not prepared in accordance with the AA1000AP (2018) principles. Inclusivity JYP Entertainment has developed and maintained different stake-holder communication channels at all levels to announce and fulfill its responsibilities to the stakeholders. Nothing comes to our atten-tion to suggest that there is a key stakeholder group left out in the process. The organization makes efforts to properly reflect opinions and expectations into its strategies. Materiality JYP Entertainment has a unique materiality assessment process to decide the impact of issues identified on its sustainability perfor-mance. We have not found any material topics left out in the pro-cess. Responsiveness JYP Entertainment prioritized material issues to provide a compre-hensive, balanced report of performance, responses, and future plans regarding them. We did not find anything to suggest that data and information disclosed in the Report do not give a fair represen-tation of JYP Entertainment actions.
Impact JYP Entertainment identifies and monitors the direct and indirect impacts of material topics found through the materiality assess-ment, and quantifies such impacts as much as possible. July 2022 Seoul, Korea CEO Reliability of Specific Sustainability Performance In-formation In addition to the adherence to AA1000AP (2018) principles, we have assessed the reliability of economic, environmental, and social per-formance data related to sustainability performance. We interviewed the in-charge persons and reviewed information on a sampling ba-sis and supporting documents as well as external sources and pub-lic databases to confirm that the disclosed data is reliable. Any in-tentional error or misstatement is not noted from the data and information disclosed in the Report.
Competence and Independence KMR maintains a comprehensive system of quality control including documented policies and procedures in accordance with ISO/IEC 17021·2015 - Requirements for bodies providing audit and certifica-tion of management systems. This engagement was carried out by an independent team of sustainability assurance professionals. KMR has no other contract with JYP Entertainment and did not pro-vide any services to JYP Entertainment that could compromise the independence of our work.
Independent Assurance Statement

# What Does JYP Entertainment Do?

JYP Entertainment Corporation is a premier South Korean multinational entertainment and record label conglomerate founded in 1997 by Park Jin-young (J.Y. Park). As one of the 'Big 4' K-pop agencies, JYP has been instrumental in shaping the K-pop industry and driving the 'Hallyu' (Korean Wave) globally. The company is involved in talent discovery and training, music production, artist management, music publishing, and event management. JYP is known for its systematic artist development programs and has produced numerous successful K-pop groups and solo artists, including Wonder Girls, 2PM, Miss A, GOT7, DAY6, TWICE, Stray Kids, ITZY, NMIXX, and the global project group VCHA. The company emphasizes values like sincerity, humility, and passion, which are often reflected in its artists and corporate culture. JYP Entertainment continuously expands its global reach through strategic partnerships and by debuting artists targeting international markets.

![](/linkedin.svg)
![JYP Entertainment logo](https://media.licdn.com/dms/image/v2/D560BAQGy5ztLGauOSw/company-logo_400_400/company-logo_400_400/0/1685009755545/jypentertainment_logo?e=1749686400&v=beta&t=THO1eViXpFEKGsue2z-jGjpKUJsEoYfuenEWoLVXB2w)

## Where Is JYP Entertainment's Headquarters?

### HQ Function

The headquarters serves as the central hub for all company operations, including A&R, artist training and development, music and content production, marketing, global business strategy, and corporate administration.

### Notable Features:

The JYP Center is renowned for its state-of-the-art facilities, including multiple dance practice rooms, vocal training rooms, recording studios, an organic cafeteria for artists and staff, an in-house cafe, and modern office spaces.

### Work Culture:

The work culture at JYP HQ is often described as dynamic, creative, and demanding, with a strong emphasis on teamwork, discipline, and artist well-being. There's a focus on continuous improvement and upholding the company's core values.

### HQ Significance:

The headquarters is a symbol of JYP's success and its commitment to providing the best environment for its artists and employees. It's a landmark for K-Pop fans and represents the heart of JYP's creative and business engine.

### Values Reflected in HQ: The HQ reflects JYP's values through its artist-centric design, emphasis on health and well-being (e.g., organic cafeteria), and pursuit of excellence (high-quality training and production facilities).

### Location:

JYP Entertainment supports global artist tours, international A&R and talent scouting (e.g., Nizi Project, A2K), localized marketing and promotions in key markets like Japan, China, and North America, and worldwide music distribution and content licensing through various partnerships. They actively create content and groups tailored for global audiences.

### Street Address:

Seoul

Seoul Special City

South Korea

### Tokyo, Japan

Address: Specific address not publicly listed, operations centered in Tokyo.

To cater specifically to the Japanese market, which is one of the largest music markets globally and has a high affinity for K-Pop. Manages localized content and artist activities.

### Beijing, China

Address: Specific address not publicly listed, operations centered in Beijing.

To establish a strong presence in the vast Chinese market, develop local talent, and manage promotions within China's unique digital and cultural landscape.

### New York, NY, USA / Los Angeles, CA, USA

Address: Operations are project-based and often utilize partner offices. JYP USA facilitates North American activities.

To expand JYP's artist reach and market penetration in North America, manage global projects like VCHA, and build strategic alliances.

title: JYP Entertainment Sustainability Report 2022
content:
Background Direction Environmental Link to SDGs Direction for Environmental Management We are taking a two-pronged approach for environmental management: response to climate change and promotion of eco-friendly values. In order to better respond to climate issues, we are working on reducing GHG emissions throughout business activities, such as managing energy consumption and transitioning to renewable energy. In 2023, we plan on creating a GHG inventory to systematically manage our GHG emissions. Plus, we contribute to spreading eco-friendly values. Our cafeteria and café are using environmentally-friendly materials and ingredients, and employees are encouraged to use a tumbler, as a way of promoting an eco-friendly culture throughout the Company. Externally, we are organizing [...] news and events ▪Publishing new content ▪Engaging with and listening to customers ▪Enterprise-wide groupware ▪Employee suggestion program (CHANGE) ▪Employee survey system ▪Listening to trainees’ opinions (JYP Talk) ▪Whistleblowing system ▪ Incorporating ethical management and a code of conduct ▪Ensuring work-life balance ▪Improving organizational culture ▪Reinforcing occupational health and safety ▪Notifying key management activities ▪ Receiving and applying suggestions through the employee suggestion program ▪In-house training ▪Whistleblowing system ▪ Company website ▪Email ▪ Establishing a sustainable cooperation system with partners ▪ Providing support and training for partners’ growth ▪Promoting fair trade practices ▪ Proposing business collaboration and new business ▪Supporting [...] Popular culture has always been keeping abreast with the times. Whenever there exist social difficulties, major players of pop culture leverage cultural competency to notify the seriousness of the problem as well as to encourage public participation.
As such, creating social values through popular culture and passing down the good impact made from those values to the next generations is our ultimate social responsibility. In the same context, we support diverse corporate philanthropy activities under a vision of ‘Every Dream Matters!’ and work together with artists and fans to promote various projects that spread positive influence across society.
